results.description: The Assets class initializes the partition during construction. It sets up the necessary storage partition for managing assets like audio files, images, or other resources used by the application. This ensures that all required assets are properly loaded and accessible when needed.

18: struct mmap_assets_table
19: {
20:     char asset_name[32];   /*!< Name of the asset */
21:     uint32_t asset_size;   /*!< Size of the asset */
22:     uint32_t asset_offset; /*!< Offset of the asset */
23:     uint16_t asset_width;  /*!< Width of the asset */
24:     uint16_t asset_height; /*!< Height of the asset */
25: };

31: Assets::~Assets()
32: {
33:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
34:     {
35:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
36:     }

39: uint32_t Assets::CalculateChecksum(const char *data, uint32_t length)
40: {
41:     uint32_t checksum = 0;
42:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < length; i++)
43:     {
44:         checksum += data[i];
45:     }
46:     return checksum & 0xFFFF;
47: }
48: 
49: bool Assets::InitializePartition()
50: {
51:     partition_valid_ = false;
52:     checksum_valid_ = false;
53:     assets_.clear();
54: 
55:     partition_ = esp_partition_find_first(ESP_PARTITION_TYPE_ANY, ESP_PARTITION_SUBTYPE_ANY, "assets");
56:     if (partition_ == nullptr)
57:     {
58:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No assets partition found");
59:         return false;
60:     }
61: 
62:     int free_pages = spi_flash_mmap_get_free_pages(SPI_FLASH_MMAP_DATA);
63:     uint32_t storage_size = free_pages * 64 * 1024;
64:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The storage free size is %ld KB", storage_size / 1024);
65:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The partition size is %ld KB", partition_->size / 1024);
66:     if (storage_size < partition_->size)
67:     {
68:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The free size %ld KB is less than assets partition required %ld KB", storage_size / 1024, partition_->size / 1024);
69:         return false;
70:     }
71: 
72:     esp_err_t err = esp_partition_mmap(partition_, 0, partition_->size, ESP_PARTITION_MMAP_DATA, (const void **)&mmap_root_, &mmap_handle_);
73:     if (err != ESP_OK)
74:     {
75:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to mmap assets partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
76:         return false;
77:     }
78: 
79:     partition_valid_ = true;
80: 
81:     uint32_t stored_files = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 0);
82:     uint32_t stored_chksum = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 4);
83:     uint32_t stored_len = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 8);
84: 
85:     if (stored_len > partition_->size - 12)
86:     {
87:         ESP_LOGD(TAG, "The stored_len (0x%lx) is greater than the partition size (0x%lx) - 12", stored_len, partition_->size);
88:         return false;
89:     }
90: 
91:     auto start_time = esp_timer_get_time();
92:     uint32_t calculated_checksum = CalculateChecksum(mmap_root_ + 12, stored_len);
93:     auto end_time = esp_timer_get_time();
94:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The checksum calculation time is %d ms", int((end_time - start_time) / 1000));
95: 
96:     if (calculated_checksum != stored_chksum)
97:     {
98:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The calculated checksum (0x%lx) does not match the stored checksum (0x%lx)", calculated_checksum, stored_chksum);
99:         return false;
100:     }
101: 
102:     checksum_valid_ = true;
103: 
104:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < stored_files; i++)
105:     {
106:         auto item = (const mmap_assets_table *)(mmap_root_ + 12 + i * sizeof(mmap_assets_table));
107:         auto asset = Asset{
108:             .size = static_cast<size_t>(item->asset_size),
109:             .offset = static_cast<size_t>(12 + sizeof(mmap_assets_table) * stored_files + item->asset_offset)};
110:         assets_[item->asset_name] = asset;
111:     }
112:     return checksum_valid_;
113: }

115: bool Assets::Apply()
116: {
117:     void *ptr = nullptr;
118:     size_t size = 0;
119:     if (!GetAssetData("index.json", ptr, size))
120:     {
121:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The index.json file is not found");
122:         return false;
123:     }
124: 
125:     cJSON *root = cJSON_ParseWithLength(static_cast<char *>(ptr), size);
126:     if (root == nullptr)
127:     {
128:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The index.json file is not valid");
129:         return false;
130:     }
131: 
132:     cJSON *version = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "version");
133:     if (cJSON_IsNumber(version))
134:     {
135:         if (version->valuedouble > 1)
136:         {
137:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The assets version %d is not supported, please upgrade the firmware", version->valueint);
138:             return false;
139:         }
140:     }
141: 
142:     cJSON *srmodels = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "srmodels");
143:     if (cJSON_IsString(srmodels))
144:     {
145:         std::string srmodels_file = srmodels->valuestring;
146:         if (GetAssetData(srmodels_file, ptr, size))
147:         {
148:             if (models_list_ != nullptr)
149:             {
150:                 esp_srmodel_deinit(models_list_);
151:                 models_list_ = nullptr;
152:             }
153:             models_list_ = srmodel_load(static_cast<uint8_t *>(ptr));
154:             if (models_list_ != nullptr)
155:             {
156:                 auto &app = Application::GetInstance();
157:                 app.GetAudioService().SetModelsList(models_list_);
158:             }
159:             else
160:             {
161:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load srmodels.bin");
162:             }
163:         }
164:         else
165:         {
166:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The srmodels file %s is not found", srmodels_file.c_str());
167:         }
168:     }
169: 
170: #ifdef HAVE_LVGL
171:     auto &theme_manager = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance();
172:     auto light_theme = theme_manager.GetTheme("light");
173:     auto dark_theme = theme_manager.GetTheme("dark");
174: 
175:     cJSON *font = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "text_font");
176:     if (cJSON_IsString(font))
177:     {
178:         std::string fonts_text_file = font->valuestring;
179:         if (GetAssetData(fonts_text_file, ptr, size))
180:         {
181:             auto text_font = std::make_shared<LvglCBinFont>(ptr);
182:             if (text_font->font() == nullptr)
183:             {
184:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load fonts.bin");
185:                 return false;
186:             }
187:             if (light_theme != nullptr)
188:             {
189:                 light_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
190:             }
191:             if (dark_theme != nullptr)
192:             {
193:                 dark_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
194:             }
195:         }
196:         else
197:         {
198:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The font file %s is not found", fonts_text_file.c_str());
199:         }
200:     }
201: 
202:     cJSON *emoji_collection = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "emoji_collection");
203:     if (cJSON_IsArray(emoji_collection))
204:     {
205:         auto custom_emoji_collection = std::make_shared<EmojiCollection>();
206:         int emoji_count = cJSON_GetArraySize(emoji_collection);
207:         for (int i = 0; i < emoji_count; i++)
208:         {
209:             cJSON *emoji = cJSON_GetArrayItem(emoji_collection, i);
210:             if (cJSON_IsObject(emoji))
211:             {
212:                 cJSON *name = cJSON_GetObjectItem(emoji, "name");
213:                 cJSON *file = cJSON_GetObjectItem(emoji, "file");
214:                 cJSON *eaf = cJSON_GetObjectItem(emoji, "eaf");
215:                 if (cJSON_IsString(name) && cJSON_IsString(file) && (NULL == eaf))
216:                 {
217:                     if (!GetAssetData(file->valuestring, ptr, size))
218:                     {
219:                         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Emoji %s image file %s is not found", name->valuestring, file->valuestring);
220:                         continue;
221:                     }
222:                     custom_emoji_collection->AddEmoji(name->valuestring, new LvglRawImage(ptr, size));
223:                 }
224:             }
225:         }
226:         if (light_theme != nullptr)
227:         {
228:             light_theme->set_emoji_collection(custom_emoji_collection);
229:         }
230:         if (dark_theme != nullptr)
231:         {
232:             dark_theme->set_emoji_collection(custom_emoji_collection);
233:         }
234:     }
235: 
236:     cJSON *skin = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "skin");
237:     if (cJSON_IsObject(skin))
238:     {
239:         cJSON *light_skin = cJSON_GetObjectItem(skin, "light");

264:         }
265:         cJSON *dark_skin = cJSON_GetObjectItem(skin, "dark");
266:         if (cJSON_IsObject(dark_skin) && dark_theme != nullptr)

268:             cJSON *text_color = cJSON_GetObjectItem(dark_skin, "text_color");

273:                 dark_theme->set_text_color(LvglTheme::ParseColor(text_color->valuestring));

275:             if (cJSON_IsString(background_color))
276:             {
277:                 dark_theme->set_background_color(LvglTheme::ParseColor(background_color->valuestring));
278:                 dark_theme->set_chat_background_color(LvglTheme::ParseColor(background_color->valuestring));
279:             }
280:             if (cJSON_IsString(background_image))
281:             {
282:                 if (!GetAssetData(background_image->valuestring, ptr, size))
283:                 {
284:                     ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The background image file %s is not found", background_image->valuestring);
285:                     return false;

287:                 auto background_image = std::make_shared<LvglCBinImage>(ptr);
288:                 dark_theme->set_background_image(background_image);

290:         }

293:     auto display = Board::GetInstance().GetDisplay();
294:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Refreshing display theme...");
295: 
296:     auto current_theme = display->GetTheme();
297:     if (current_theme != nullptr)
298:     {
299:         display->SetTheme(current_theme);
300:     }

303:     cJSON *hide_subtitle = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "hide_subtitle");
304:     if (cJSON_IsBool(hide_subtitle))
305:     {
306:         bool hide = cJSON_IsTrue(hide_subtitle);
307:         auto lcd_display = dynamic_cast<LcdDisplay *>(display);
308:         if (lcd_display != nullptr)

310:             lcd_display->SetHideSubtitle(hide);
311:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Set hide_subtitle to %s", hide ? "true" : "false");
312:         }
313:     }

315: #elif defined(CONFIG_USE_EMOTE_MESSAGE_STYLE)
316:     auto &board = Board::GetInstance();
317:     auto display = board.GetDisplay();

319: 
320:     cJSON *font = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "text_font");
321:     if (cJSON_IsString(font))
322:     {

345:     if (cJSON_IsArray(emoji_collection))

423:     if (cJSON_IsArray(layout_json))

427:         for (int i = 0; i < layout_count; i++)
428:         {

430:             if (cJSON_IsObject(layout_item))
431:             {
432:                 cJSON *name = cJSON_GetObjectItem(layout_item, "name");
433:                 cJSON *align = cJSON_GetObjectItem(layout_item, "align");
434:                 cJSON *x = cJSON_GetObjectItem(layout_item, "x");
435:                 cJSON *y = cJSON_GetObjectItem(layout_item, "y");
436:                 cJSON *width = cJSON_GetObjectItem(layout_item, "width");
437:                 cJSON *height = cJSON_GetObjectItem(layout_item, "height");
438: 
439:                 if (cJSON_IsString(name) && cJSON_IsString(align) && cJSON_IsNumber(x) && cJSON_IsNumber(y))
440:                 {

442:                     int height_val = cJSON_IsNumber(height) ? height->valueint : 0;

444:                     if (emote_display)

463: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
464: {
465:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
466: 
467:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
468:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
469:     {
470:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
471:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
472:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
473:     }
474:     checksum_valid_ = false;
475:     assets_.clear();
476: 
477:     // 下载新的资源文件
478:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
479:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
480: 
481:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
482:     {
483:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
484:         return false;
485:     }
486: 
487:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
488:     {
489:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
490:         return false;
491:     }
492: 
493:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
494:     if (content_length == 0)
495:     {
496:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
497:         return false;
498:     }
499: 
500:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
501:     {
502:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
503:         return false;
504:     }
505: 
506:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
507:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
508: 
509:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
510:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
511:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
512: 
513:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
514:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
515: 
516:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
517:     char buffer[512];
518:     size_t total_written = 0;
519:     size_t recent_written = 0;
520:     size_t current_sector = 0;
521:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
522: 
523:     while (true)
524:     {
525:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
526:         if (ret < 0)
527:         {
528:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
529:             return false;
530:         }
531: 
532:         if (ret == 0)
533:         {
534:             break;
535:         }
536: 
537:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
538:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
539:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
540: 
541:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
542:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
543:         {
544:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
545:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
546: 
547:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
548:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
549:             {
550:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
551:                 return false;
552:             }
553: 
554:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
555:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
556:             if (err != ESP_OK)
557:             {
558:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
559:                 return false;
560:             }
561: 
562:             current_sector++;
563:         }
564: 
565:         // 写入数据到分区
566:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
567:         if (err != ESP_OK)
568:         {
569:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
570:             return false;
571:         }
572: 
573:         total_written += ret;
574:         recent_written += ret;
575: 
576:         // 计算进度和速度
577:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
578:         {
579:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
580:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
581:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
582:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
583:             if (progress_callback)
584:             {
585:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
586:             }
587:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
588:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
589:         }
590:     }
591: 
592:     http->Close();
593: 
594:     if (total_written != content_length)
595:     {
596:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
597:         return false;
598:     }
599: 
600:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
601:              total_written, current_sector);
602: 
603:     // 重新初始化资源分区
604:     if (!InitializePartition())
605:     {
606:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
607:         return false;
608:     }
609: 
610:     return true;
611: }
612: 
613: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
614: {
615:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
616:     if (asset == assets_.end())
617:     {
618:         return false;
619:     }
620:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
621:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
622:     {
623:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
624:         return false;
625:     }
626: 
627:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
628:     size = asset->second.size;
629:     return true;
630: }
631: 
</file>

results.description: The `Assets` destructor releases memory-mapped partition resources when the object is destroyed. It ensures proper cleanup of mapped memory by unmapping the partition if a valid handle exists. This prevents resource leaks and maintains system stability during asset management operations.

37: uint32_t Assets::CalculateChecksum(const char *data, uint32_t length)
38: {
39:     uint32_t checksum = 0;
40:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < length; i++)
41:     {
42:         checksum += data[i];
43:     }
44:     return checksum & 0xFFFF;
45: }

47: bool Assets::InitializePartition()
48: {
49:     partition_valid_ = false;
50:     checksum_valid_ = false;
51:     assets_.clear();
52: 
53:     partition_ = esp_partition_find_first(ESP_PARTITION_TYPE_ANY, ESP_PARTITION_SUBTYPE_ANY, "assets");
54:     if (partition_ == nullptr)
55:     {
56:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No assets partition found");
57:         return false;
58:     }
59: 
60:     int free_pages = spi_flash_mmap_get_free_pages(SPI_FLASH_MMAP_DATA);
61:     uint32_t storage_size = free_pages * 64 * 1024;
62:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The storage free size is %ld KB", storage_size / 1024);
63:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The partition size is %ld KB", partition_->size / 1024);
64:     if (storage_size < partition_->size)
65:     {
66:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The free size %ld KB is less than assets partition required %ld KB", storage_size / 1024, partition_->size / 1024);
67:         return false;
68:     }
69: 
70:     esp_err_t err = esp_partition_mmap(partition_, 0, partition_->size, ESP_PARTITION_MMAP_DATA, (const void **)&mmap_root_, &mmap_handle_);
71:     if (err != ESP_OK)
72:     {
73:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to mmap assets partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
74:         return false;
75:     }
76: 
77:     partition_valid_ = true;
78: 
79:     uint32_t stored_files = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 0);
80:     uint32_t stored_chksum = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 4);
81:     uint32_t stored_len = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 8);
82: 
83:     if (stored_len > partition_->size - 12)
84:     {
85:         ESP_LOGD(TAG, "The stored_len (0x%lx) is greater than the partition size (0x%lx) - 12", stored_len, partition_->size);
86:         return false;
87:     }
88: 
89:     auto start_time = esp_timer_get_time();
90:     uint32_t calculated_checksum = CalculateChecksum(mmap_root_ + 12, stored_len);
91:     auto end_time = esp_timer_get_time();
92:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The checksum calculation time is %d ms", int((end_time - start_time) / 1000));
93: 
94:     if (calculated_checksum != stored_chksum)
95:     {
96:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The calculated checksum (0x%lx) does not match the stored checksum (0x%lx)", calculated_checksum, stored_chksum);
97:         return false;
98:     }
99: 
100:     checksum_valid_ = true;
101: 
102:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < stored_files; i++)
103:     {
104:         auto item = (const mmap_assets_table *)(mmap_root_ + 12 + i * sizeof(mmap_assets_table));
105:         auto asset = Asset{
106:             .size = static_cast<size_t>(item->asset_size),
107:             .offset = static_cast<size_t>(12 + sizeof(mmap_assets_table) * stored_files + item->asset_offset)};
108:         assets_[item->asset_name] = asset;
109:     }
110:     return checksum_valid_;
111: }

461: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
462: {
463:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
464: 
465:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
466:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
467:     {
468:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
469:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
470:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
471:     }
472:     checksum_valid_ = false;
473:     assets_.clear();
474: 
475:     // 下载新的资源文件
476:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
477:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
478: 
479:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
480:     {
481:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
482:         return false;
483:     }
484: 
485:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
486:     {
487:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
488:         return false;
489:     }
490: 
491:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
492:     if (content_length == 0)
493:     {
494:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
495:         return false;
496:     }
497: 
498:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
499:     {
500:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
501:         return false;
502:     }
503: 
504:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
505:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
506: 
507:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
508:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
509:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
510: 
511:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
512:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
513: 
514:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
515:     char buffer[512];
516:     size_t total_written = 0;
517:     size_t recent_written = 0;
518:     size_t current_sector = 0;
519:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
520: 
521:     while (true)
522:     {
523:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
524:         if (ret < 0)
525:         {
526:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
527:             return false;
528:         }
529: 
530:         if (ret == 0)
531:         {
532:             break;
533:         }
534: 
535:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
536:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
537:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
538: 
539:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
540:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
541:         {
542:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
543:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
544: 
545:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
546:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
547:             {
548:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
549:                 return false;
550:             }
551: 
552:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
553:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
554:             if (err != ESP_OK)
555:             {
556:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
557:                 return false;
558:             }
559: 
560:             current_sector++;
561:         }
562: 
563:         // 写入数据到分区
564:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
565:         if (err != ESP_OK)
566:         {
567:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
568:             return false;
569:         }
570: 
571:         total_written += ret;
572:         recent_written += ret;
573: 
574:         // 计算进度和速度
575:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
576:         {
577:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
578:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
579:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
580:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
581:             if (progress_callback)
582:             {
583:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
584:             }
585:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
586:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
587:         }
588:     }
589: 
590:     http->Close();
591: 
592:     if (total_written != content_length)
593:     {
594:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
595:         return false;
596:     }
597: 
598:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
599:              total_written, current_sector);
600: 
601:     // 重新初始化资源分区
602:     if (!InitializePartition())
603:     {
604:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
605:         return false;
606:     }
607: 
608:     return true;
609: }
610: 
611: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
612: {
613:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
614:     if (asset == assets_.end())
615:     {
616:         return false;
617:     }
618:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
619:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
620:     {
621:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
622:         return false;
623:     }
624: 
625:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
626:     size = asset->second.size;
627:     return true;
628: }
629:

45: bool Assets::InitializePartition()
46: {
47:     partition_valid_ = false;
48:     checksum_valid_ = false;
49:     assets_.clear();
50: 
51:     partition_ = esp_partition_find_first(ESP_PARTITION_TYPE_ANY, ESP_PARTITION_SUBTYPE_ANY, "assets");
52:     if (partition_ == nullptr)
53:     {
54:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No assets partition found");
55:         return false;
56:     }
57: 
58:     int free_pages = spi_flash_mmap_get_free_pages(SPI_FLASH_MMAP_DATA);
59:     uint32_t storage_size = free_pages * 64 * 1024;
60:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The storage free size is %ld KB", storage_size / 1024);
61:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The partition size is %ld KB", partition_->size / 1024);
62:     if (storage_size < partition_->size)
63:     {
64:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The free size %ld KB is less than assets partition required %ld KB", storage_size / 1024, partition_->size / 1024);
65:         return false;
66:     }
67: 
68:     esp_err_t err = esp_partition_mmap(partition_, 0, partition_->size, ESP_PARTITION_MMAP_DATA, (const void **)&mmap_root_, &mmap_handle_);
69:     if (err != ESP_OK)
70:     {
71:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to mmap assets partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
72:         return false;
73:     }
74: 
75:     partition_valid_ = true;
76: 
77:     uint32_t stored_files = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 0);
78:     uint32_t stored_chksum = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 4);
79:     uint32_t stored_len = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 8);
80: 
81:     if (stored_len > partition_->size - 12)
82:     {
83:         ESP_LOGD(TAG, "The stored_len (0x%lx) is greater than the partition size (0x%lx) - 12", stored_len, partition_->size);
84:         return false;
85:     }
86: 
87:     auto start_time = esp_timer_get_time();
88:     uint32_t calculated_checksum = CalculateChecksum(mmap_root_ + 12, stored_len);
89:     auto end_time = esp_timer_get_time();
90:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The checksum calculation time is %d ms", int((end_time - start_time) / 1000));
91: 
92:     if (calculated_checksum != stored_chksum)
93:     {
94:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The calculated checksum (0x%lx) does not match the stored checksum (0x%lx)", calculated_checksum, stored_chksum);
95:         return false;
96:     }
97: 
98:     checksum_valid_ = true;
99: 
100:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < stored_files; i++)
101:     {
102:         auto item = (const mmap_assets_table *)(mmap_root_ + 12 + i * sizeof(mmap_assets_table));
103:         auto asset = Asset{
104:             .size = static_cast<size_t>(item->asset_size),
105:             .offset = static_cast<size_t>(12 + sizeof(mmap_assets_table) * stored_files + item->asset_offset)};
106:         assets_[item->asset_name] = asset;
107:     }
108:     return checksum_valid_;
109: }

434: 
435:                 if (cJSON_IsString(name) && cJSON_IsString(align) && cJSON_IsNumber(x) && cJSON_IsNumber(y))
436:                 {
437:                     int width_val = cJSON_IsNumber(width) ? width->valueint : 0;
438:                     int height_val = cJSON_IsNumber(height) ? height->valueint : 0;
439: 
440:                     if (emote_display)
441:                     {
442:                         emote_display->AddLayoutData(name->valuestring, align->valuestring,
443:                                                      x->valueint, y->valueint, width_val, height_val);
444:                     }
445:                 }
446:                 else
447:                 {
448:                     ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid layout item %d: missing required fields", i);
449:                 }
450:             }
451:         }
452:     }
453: #endif
454: 
455:     cJSON_Delete(root);
456:     return true;

459: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
460: {
461:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
462: 
463:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
464:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
465:     {
466:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
467:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
468:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
469:     }
470:     checksum_valid_ = false;
471:     assets_.clear();
472: 
473:     // 下载新的资源文件
474:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
475:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
476: 
477:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
478:     {
479:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
480:         return false;
481:     }
482: 
483:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
484:     {
485:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
486:         return false;
487:     }
488: 
489:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
490:     if (content_length == 0)
491:     {
492:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
493:         return false;
494:     }
495: 
496:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
497:     {
498:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
499:         return false;
500:     }
501: 
502:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
503:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
504: 
505:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
506:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
507:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
508: 
509:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
510:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
511: 
512:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
513:     char buffer[512];
514:     size_t total_written = 0;
515:     size_t recent_written = 0;
516:     size_t current_sector = 0;
517:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
518: 
519:     while (true)
520:     {
521:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
522:         if (ret < 0)
523:         {
524:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
525:             return false;
526:         }
527: 
528:         if (ret == 0)
529:         {
530:             break;
531:         }
532: 
533:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
534:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
535:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
536: 
537:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
538:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
539:         {
540:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
541:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
542: 
543:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
544:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
545:             {
546:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
547:                 return false;
548:             }
549: 
550:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
551:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
552:             if (err != ESP_OK)
553:             {
554:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
555:                 return false;
556:             }
557: 
558:             current_sector++;
559:         }
560: 
561:         // 写入数据到分区
562:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
563:         if (err != ESP_OK)
564:         {
565:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
566:             return false;
567:         }
568: 
569:         total_written += ret;
570:         recent_written += ret;
571: 
572:         // 计算进度和速度
573:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
574:         {
575:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
576:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
577:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
578:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
579:             if (progress_callback)
580:             {
581:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
582:             }
583:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
584:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
585:         }
586:     }
587: 
588:     http->Close();
589: 
590:     if (total_written != content_length)
591:     {
592:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
593:         return false;
594:     }
595: 
596:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
597:              total_written, current_sector);
598: 
599:     // 重新初始化资源分区
600:     if (!InitializePartition())
601:     {
602:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
603:         return false;
604:     }
605: 
606:     return true;
607: }
608: 
609: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
610: {
611:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
612:     if (asset == assets_.end())
613:     {
614:         return false;
615:     }
616:     auto data = (const char *)(mmap_root_ + asset->second.offset);
617:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
618:     {
619:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
620:         return false;
621:     }
622: 
623:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
624:     size = asset->second.size;
625:     return true;
626: }
627: 
</file>

Semantic Correctness (95): The generated code is semantically correct and produces the same result as the ground truth. Both implementations calculate a checksum by summing all bytes in the input data and masking the result to 16 bits. The only minor difference is that the generated code uses explicit static_cast<uint8_t> while the ground truth relies on implicit conversion, but this doesn't affect the final outcome.

Structure Similarity (90): The code structure is very similar with identical function signatures, loop constructs, and overall flow. The main differences are stylistic: the generated code uses more verbose formatting (extra newlines, bracket placement) and includes a comment explaining the masking operation. These are minor structural variations that don't impact functionality.

Functional Completeness (100): The generated code covers all key functionalities present in the ground truth. It correctly implements the checksum calculation algorithm, handles the same parameters, performs the same arithmetic operations, and applies the same bit masking to produce a 16-bit result. The explicit casting in the generated version actually makes the byte-wise interpretation more explicit and potentially clearer.

results.description: The function initializes and validates an assets partition in flash memory, ensuring it exists, has sufficient space, and passes checksum verification. It maps the partition into memory and builds an index of assets with their sizes and offsets for efficient access. Returns true if the partition is successfully initialized and validated, false otherwise.

41: uint32_t Assets::CalculateChecksum(const char *data, uint32_t length)
42: {
43:     uint32_t checksum = 0;
44:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < length; i++)
45:     {
46:         checksum += data[i];
47:     }
48:     return checksum & 0xFFFF;
49: }

405:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
406: 
407:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
408:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
409:     {
410:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
411:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
412:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
413:     }
414:     checksum_valid_ = false;
415:     assets_.clear();
416: 
417:     // 下载新的资源文件
418:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
419:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);

421:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
422:     {
423:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
424:         return false;
425:     }
426: 
427:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
428:     {
429:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
430:         return false;
431:     }
432: 
433:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
434:     if (content_length == 0)
435:     {
436:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
437:         return false;
438:     }
439: 
440:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
441:     {
442:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
443:         return false;
444:     }
445: 
446:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
447:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
448: 
449:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
450:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
451:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
452: 
453:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
454:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
455: 
456:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
457:     char buffer[512];
458:     size_t total_written = 0;
459:     size_t recent_written = 0;
460:     size_t current_sector = 0;
461:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
462: 
463:     while (true)
464:     {
465:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
466:         if (ret < 0)
467:         {
468:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
469:             return false;
470:         }
471: 
472:         if (ret == 0)
473:         {
474:             break;
475:         }
476: 
477:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
478:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
479:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
480: 
481:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
482:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
483:         {
484:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
485:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
486: 
487:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
488:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
489:             {
490:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
491:                 return false;
492:             }
493: 
494:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
495:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
496:             if (err != ESP_OK)
497:             {
498:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
499:                 return false;
500:             }
501: 
502:             current_sector++;
503:         }
504: 
505:         // 写入数据到分区
506:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
507:         if (err != ESP_OK)
508:         {
509:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
510:             return false;
511:         }
512: 
513:         total_written += ret;
514:         recent_written += ret;
515: 
516:         // 计算进度和速度
517:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
518:         {
519:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
520:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
521:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
522:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
523:             if (progress_callback)
524:             {
525:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
526:             }
527:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
528:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
529:         }
530:     }
531: 
532:     http->Close();
533: 
534:     if (total_written != content_length)
535:     {
536:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
537:         return false;
538:     }
539: 
540:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
541:              total_written, current_sector);
542: 
543:     // 重新初始化资源分区
544:     if (!InitializePartition())
545:     {
546:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
547:         return false;
548:     }
549: 
550:     return true;
551: }

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The general goal of initializing an assets partition is preserved.
- However, there are significant semantic differences:
  * Uses a hardcoded magic number check instead of reading structured metadata from fixed offsets.
  * Misinterprets the data layout (e.g., assumes 8-byte header, but GT uses 12 bytes before file list).
  * Incorrectly calculates checksum over entire partition size minus 8, whereas GT computes it only over actual stored length.
  * Parsing logic differs significantly — GT reads a known count of files and constructs asset entries accordingly; generated code attempts to parse until zero size, which may be incorrect or unsafe.

Structure Similarity:
- Both functions follow a similar high-level sequence: find partition → mmap → validate → populate index.
- Differences include:
  * Partition subtype filtering: GT accepts any type/subtype, while generated restricts to DATA/SPIFFS.
  * Error handling diverges; generated unmaps memory on failure, which GT doesn't do explicitly.
  * Logging messages and variable names differ substantially.
  * Function call patterns vary (e.g., use of timers for timing checksum in GT).

Functional Completeness:
- Core functionality like finding the partition, mapping it, validating content, and building an asset index exists.
- Missing elements:
  * No logging of storage vs partition size comparison.
  * Lacks explicit setting of `partition_valid_` flag.
  * Doesn't read stored file count and stored length fields correctly from the partition header.
  * Asset indexing method differs and might miss proper bounds checking or alignment assumptions used in GT.
  * Memory unmapping upon error isn’t handled consistently with GT behavior.

results.description: The `Assets::Apply()` function loads and applies system assets from an "index.json" configuration file, including speech recognition models and UI themes with associated fonts and emojis. It validates the asset version and initializes or updates the corresponding subsystems within the application. Returns true if all assets are successfully applied, otherwise returns false and logs errors.

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code shows significant divergence from the ground truth in both semantics and functionality:

Semantic Issues:
- Completely omits critical validation logic for version checking (ground truth checks version <= 1)
- Misinterprets the JSON schema - looks for "theme" object instead of individual theme properties
- Incorrectly handles version as string instead of number
- Uses non-existent APIs like `lvgl_theme_load_font()` and `EmoteDisplay::GetInstance()`
- Implements model loading with wrong data structures (`srmodel_info_t` instead of `srmodel_load`)

Structural Issues:
- Missing conditional compilation blocks for HAVE_LVGL vs CONFIG_USE_EMOTE_MESSAGE_STYLE
- Different function call patterns (e.g., uses `cJSON_Parse` instead of `cJSON_ParseWithLength`)
- No error handling for unsupported versions
- Incorrect memory management approach
- Missing integration with actual framework classes (LvglThemeManager, Application services)

Functional Gaps:
- No support for emoji collections with detailed metadata parsing
- Missing skin/color configuration processing
- Lacks font handling for both LVGL and emote display systems
- No layout configuration support
- Missing hide_subtitle configuration
- No proper cleanup/deinitialization of existing resources before loading new ones
- Doesn't handle EAF (emoji animation format) files
- Omits background image loading for themes

While the general concept of parsing index.json and applying assets is preserved, nearly all specific implementation details are incorrect or missing. The generated code would likely not compile or function correctly in the target environment.

41: uint32_t Assets::CalculateChecksum(const char *data, uint32_t length)
42: {
43:     uint32_t checksum = 0;
44:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < length; i++)
45:     {
46:         checksum += data[i];
47:     }
48:     return checksum & 0xFFFF;
49: }

51: bool Assets::InitializePartition()
52: {
53:     partition_valid_ = false;
54:     checksum_valid_ = false;
55:     assets_.clear();
56: 
57:     partition_ = esp_partition_find_first(ESP_PARTITION_TYPE_ANY, ESP_PARTITION_SUBTYPE_ANY, "assets");
58:     if (partition_ == nullptr)
59:     {
60:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No assets partition found");
61:         return false;
62:     }
63: 
64:     int free_pages = spi_flash_mmap_get_free_pages(SPI_FLASH_MMAP_DATA);
65:     uint32_t storage_size = free_pages * 64 * 1024;
66:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The storage free size is %ld KB", storage_size / 1024);
67:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The partition size is %ld KB", partition_->size / 1024);
68:     if (storage_size < partition_->size)
69:     {
70:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The free size %ld KB is less than assets partition required %ld KB", storage_size / 1024, partition_->size / 1024);
71:         return false;
72:     }
73: 
74:     esp_err_t err = esp_partition_mmap(partition_, 0, partition_->size, ESP_PARTITION_MMAP_DATA, (const void **)&mmap_root_, &mmap_handle_);
75:     if (err != ESP_OK)
76:     {
77:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to mmap assets partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
78:         return false;
79:     }
80: 
81:     partition_valid_ = true;
82: 
83:     uint32_t stored_files = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 0);
84:     uint32_t stored_chksum = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 4);
85:     uint32_t stored_len = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 8);
86: 
87:     if (stored_len > partition_->size - 12)
88:     {
89:         ESP_LOGD(TAG, "The stored_len (0x%lx) is greater than the partition size (0x%lx) - 12", stored_len, partition_->size);
90:         return false;
91:     }
92: 
93:     auto start_time = esp_timer_get_time();
94:     uint32_t calculated_checksum = CalculateChecksum(mmap_root_ + 12, stored_len);
95:     auto end_time = esp_timer_get_time();
96:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The checksum calculation time is %d ms", int((end_time - start_time) / 1000));
97: 
98:     if (calculated_checksum != stored_chksum)
99:     {
100:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The calculated checksum (0x%lx) does not match the stored checksum (0x%lx)", calculated_checksum, stored_chksum);
101:         return false;
102:     }
103: 
104:     checksum_valid_ = true;
105: 
106:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < stored_files; i++)
107:     {
108:         auto item = (const mmap_assets_table *)(mmap_root_ + 12 + i * sizeof(mmap_assets_table));
109:         auto asset = Asset{
110:             .size = static_cast<size_t>(item->asset_size),
111:             .offset = static_cast<size_t>(12 + sizeof(mmap_assets_table) * stored_files + item->asset_offset)};
112:         assets_[item->asset_name] = asset;
113:     }
114:     return checksum_valid_;
115: }

469: bool Assets::GetAssetData(const std::string &name, void *&ptr, size_t &size)
470: {
471:     auto asset = assets_.find(name);
472:     if (asset == assets_.end())
473:     {

477:     if (data[0] != 'Z' || data[1] != 'Z')
478:     {
479:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The asset %s is not valid with magic %02x%02x", name.c_str(), data[0], data[1]);
480:         return false;
481:     }
482: 
483:     ptr = static_cast<void *>(const_cast<char *>(data + 2));
484:     size = asset->second.size;
485:     return true;

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
The generated code attempts to implement a download functionality that writes data into a partition, but there are significant semantic differences:
- It uses `esp_http_client` directly instead of an abstracted Network/HTTP interface.
- It erases the entire partition upfront rather than dynamically erasing sectors as needed during writing.
- Progress reporting logic differs significantly in frequency and calculation method.
- There's an attempt to write header information at the end which is not part of the original logic.
- The offset handling (e.g., +12) suggests assumptions about file headers not present in the ground truth.

Structure Similarity:
While both functions follow a general pattern of HTTP setup → reading data → writing to flash → cleanup, the structural details vary widely:
- Different HTTP client APIs are used (`Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork()` vs `esp_http_client_*`)
- Different approaches to sector management (full erase vs incremental erasure)
- Control flow diverges in how errors are handled and where callbacks occur
- Buffer sizes differ (512B vs 4096B)

Functional Completeness:
The generated code covers core elements like downloading over HTTP, writing to flash partition, progress callback mechanism, and reinitialization. However, it misses some nuanced behaviors:
- Dynamic sector-by-sector erasing based on write position
- Accurate timing for progress/speed updates (every second vs every 100ms with smoothing)
- Proper validation steps such as checking HTTP status codes explicitly
- Logging consistency and error granularity matching the ground truth

Overall, while the basic intent aligns — downloading assets via HTTP and storing them in a flash partition with progress feedback — the implementation strategy, resource handling, and finer-grained control differ substantially from the reference solution.

65:     uint32_t storage_size = free_pages * 64 * 1024;
66:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The storage free size is %ld KB", storage_size / 1024);
67:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The partition size is %ld KB", partition_->size / 1024);
68:     if (storage_size < partition_->size)
69:     {
70:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The free size %ld KB is less than assets partition required %ld KB", storage_size / 1024, partition_->size / 1024);
71:         return false;
72:     }
73: 
74:     esp_err_t err = esp_partition_mmap(partition_, 0, partition_->size, ESP_PARTITION_MMAP_DATA, (const void **)&mmap_root_, &mmap_handle_);
75:     if (err != ESP_OK)
76:     {
77:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to mmap assets partition: %s", esp_err_to_name(err));
78:         return false;
79:     }
80: 
81:     partition_valid_ = true;
82: 
83:     uint32_t stored_files = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 0);
84:     uint32_t stored_chksum = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 4);
85:     uint32_t stored_len = *(uint32_t *)(mmap_root_ + 8);
86: 
87:     if (stored_len > partition_->size - 12)
88:     {
89:         ESP_LOGD(TAG, "The stored_len (0x%lx) is greater than the partition size (0x%lx) - 12", stored_len, partition_->size);
90:         return false;
91:     }
92: 
93:     auto start_time = esp_timer_get_time();
94:     uint32_t calculated_checksum = CalculateChecksum(mmap_root_ + 12, stored_len);
95:     auto end_time = esp_timer_get_time();
96:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "The checksum calculation time is %d ms", int((end_time - start_time) / 1000));
97: 
98:     if (calculated_checksum != stored_chksum)
99:     {
100:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "The calculated checksum (0x%lx) does not match the stored checksum (0x%lx)", calculated_checksum, stored_chksum);
101:         return false;
102:     }
103: 
104:     checksum_valid_ = true;
105: 
106:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < stored_files; i++)
107:     {
108:         auto item = (const mmap_assets_table *)(mmap_root_ + 12 + i * sizeof(mmap_assets_table));
109:         auto asset = Asset{
110:             .size = static_cast<size_t>(item->asset_size),
111:             .offset = static_cast<size_t>(12 + sizeof(mmap_assets_table) * stored_files + item->asset_offset)};
112:         assets_[item->asset_name] = asset;
113:     }
114:     return checksum_valid_;
115: }

465: bool Assets::Download(std::string url, std::function<void(int progress, size_t speed)> progress_callback)
466: {
467:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Downloading new version of assets from %s", url.c_str());
468: 
469:     // 取消当前资源分区的内存映射
470:     if (mmap_handle_ != 0)
471:     {
472:         esp_partition_munmap(mmap_handle_);
473:         mmap_handle_ = 0;
474:         mmap_root_ = nullptr;
475:     }
476:     checksum_valid_ = false;
477:     assets_.clear();
478: 
479:     // 下载新的资源文件
480:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
481:     auto http = network->CreateHttp(0);
482: 
483:     if (!http->Open("GET", url))
484:     {
485:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to open HTTP connection");
486:         return false;
487:     }
488: 
489:     if (http->GetStatusCode() != 200)
490:     {
491:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get assets, status code: %d", http->GetStatusCode());
492:         return false;
493:     }
494: 
495:     size_t content_length = http->GetBodyLength();
496:     if (content_length == 0)
497:     {
498:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get content length");
499:         return false;
500:     }
501: 
502:     if (content_length > partition_->size)
503:     {
504:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Assets file size (%u) is larger than partition size (%lu)", content_length, partition_->size);
505:         return false;
506:     }
507: 
508:     // 定义扇区大小为4KB（ESP32的标准扇区大小）
509:     const size_t SECTOR_SIZE = esp_partition_get_main_flash_sector_size();
510: 
511:     // 计算需要擦除的扇区数量
512:     size_t sectors_to_erase = (content_length + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE; // 向上取整
513:     size_t total_erase_size = sectors_to_erase * SECTOR_SIZE;
514: 
515:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Sector size: %u, content length: %u, sectors to erase: %u, total erase size: %u",
516:              SECTOR_SIZE, content_length, sectors_to_erase, total_erase_size);
517: 
518:     // 写入新的资源文件到分区，一边erase一边写入
519:     char buffer[512];
520:     size_t total_written = 0;
521:     size_t recent_written = 0;
522:     size_t current_sector = 0;
523:     auto last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
524: 
525:     while (true)
526:     {
527:         int ret = http->Read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
528:         if (ret < 0)
529:         {
530:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to read HTTP data: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
531:             return false;
532:         }
533: 
534:         if (ret == 0)
535:         {
536:             break;
537:         }
538: 
539:         // 检查是否需要擦除新的扇区
540:         size_t write_end_offset = total_written + ret;
541:         size_t needed_sectors = (write_end_offset + SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / SECTOR_SIZE;
542: 
543:         // 擦除需要的新扇区
544:         while (current_sector < needed_sectors)
545:         {
546:             size_t sector_start = current_sector * SECTOR_SIZE;
547:             size_t sector_end = (current_sector + 1) * SECTOR_SIZE;
548: 
549:             // 确保擦除范围不超过分区大小
550:             if (sector_end > partition_->size)
551:             {
552:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Sector end (%u) exceeds partition size (%lu)", sector_end, partition_->size);
553:                 return false;
554:             }
555: 
556:             ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Erasing sector %u (offset: %u, size: %u)", current_sector, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
557:             esp_err_t err = esp_partition_erase_range(partition_, sector_start, SECTOR_SIZE);
558:             if (err != ESP_OK)
559:             {
560:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to erase sector %u at offset %u: %s", current_sector, sector_start, esp_err_to_name(err));
561:                 return false;
562:             }
563: 
564:             current_sector++;
565:         }
566: 
567:         // 写入数据到分区
568:         esp_err_t err = esp_partition_write(partition_, total_written, buffer, ret);
569:         if (err != ESP_OK)
570:         {
571:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to write to assets partition at offset %u: %s", total_written, esp_err_to_name(err));
572:             return false;
573:         }
574: 
575:         total_written += ret;
576:         recent_written += ret;
577: 
578:         // 计算进度和速度
579:         if (esp_timer_get_time() - last_calc_time >= 1000000 || total_written == content_length || ret == 0)
580:         {
581:             size_t progress = total_written * 100 / content_length;
582:             size_t speed = recent_written; // 每秒的字节数
583:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Progress: %u%% (%u/%u), Speed: %u B/s, Sectors erased: %u",
584:                      progress, total_written, content_length, speed, current_sector);
585:             if (progress_callback)
586:             {
587:                 progress_callback(progress, speed);
588:             }
589:             last_calc_time = esp_timer_get_time();
590:             recent_written = 0; // 重置最近写入的字节数
591:         }
592:     }
593: 
594:     http->Close();
595: 
596:     if (total_written != content_length)
597:     {
598:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Downloaded size (%u) does not match expected size (%u)", total_written, content_length);
599:         return false;
600:     }
601: 
602:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Assets download completed, total written: %u bytes, total sectors erased: %u",
603:              total_written, current_sector);
604: 
605:     // 重新初始化资源分区
606:     if (!InitializePartition())
607:     {
608:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to re-initialize assets partition");
609:         return false;
610:     }
611: 
612:     return true;
613: }

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code follows a similar logical flow to the ground truth but misses critical validation steps. Both implementations:
- Check for asset existence using assets_.find()
- Set ptr and size output parameters
- Return boolean success/failure

However, key differences impact correctness:
- Missing magic number validation ('Z' 'Z' check) which is essential for asset integrity verification
- No error logging via ESP_LOGE when assets are invalid
- Different memory offset handling (ground truth skips first 2 bytes, generated code doesn't)
- Uses partition_valid_ check instead of direct asset validation

Structure is very similar with identical function signature, control flow patterns, and use of iterators. The main structural difference is the additional partition validation check.

31: bool DeviceStateMachine::IsValidTransition(DeviceState from, DeviceState to) const
32: {
33:     // Allow transition to the same state (no-op)
34:     if (from == to)
35:     {
36:         return true;
37:     }
38: 
39:     // Define valid state transitions based on the state diagram
40:     switch (from)
41:     {
42:     case kDeviceStateUnknown:
43:         // Can only go to starting
44:         return to == kDeviceStateStarting;
45: 
46:     case kDeviceStateStarting:
47:         // Can go to wifi configuring or activating
48:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring ||
49:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
50: 
51:     case kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring:
52:         // Can go to activating (after wifi connected) or audio testing
53:         return to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
54:                to == kDeviceStateAudioTesting;
55: 
56:     case kDeviceStateAudioTesting:
57:         // Can go back to wifi configuring
58:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
59: 
60:     case kDeviceStateActivating:
61:         // Can go to upgrading, idle, or back to wifi configuring (on error)
62:         return to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
63:                to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
64:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
65: 
66:     case kDeviceStateUpgrading:
67:         // Can go to idle (upgrade failed) or activating
68:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
69:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
70: 
71:     case kDeviceStateIdle:
72:         // Can go to connecting, listening (manual mode), speaking, activating, upgrading, or wifi configuring
73:         return to == kDeviceStateConnecting ||
74:                to == kDeviceStateListening ||
75:                to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
76:                to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
77:                to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
78:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
79: 
80:     case kDeviceStateConnecting:
81:         // Can go to idle (failed) or listening (success)
82:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
83:                to == kDeviceStateListening;
84: 
85:     case kDeviceStateListening:
86:         // Can go to speaking or idle
87:         return to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
88:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
89: 
90:     case kDeviceStateSpeaking:
91:         // Can go to listening or idle
92:         return to == kDeviceStateListening ||
93:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
94: 
95:     case kDeviceStateFatalError:
96:         // Cannot transition out of fatal error
97:         return false;
98: 
99:     default:
100:         return false;
101:     }
102: }
103: 
104: bool DeviceStateMachine::CanTransitionTo(DeviceState target) const
105: {
106:     return IsValidTransition(current_state_.load(), target);
107: }
108: 
109: bool DeviceStateMachine::TransitionTo(DeviceState new_state)
110: {
111:     DeviceState old_state = current_state_.load();
112: 
113:     // No-op if already in the target state
114:     if (old_state == new_state)
115:     {
116:         return true;
117:     }
118: 
119:     // Validate transition
120:     if (!IsValidTransition(old_state, new_state))
121:     {
122:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid state transition: %s -> %s",
123:                  GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
124:         return false;
125:     }
126: 
127:     // Perform transition
128:     current_state_.store(new_state);
129:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "State: %s -> %s",
130:              GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
131: 
132:     // Notify callback
133:     NotifyStateChange(old_state, new_state);
134:     return true;
135: }
136: 
137: int DeviceStateMachine::AddStateChangeListener(StateCallback callback)
138: {
139:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
140:     int id = next_listener_id_++;
141:     listeners_.emplace_back(id, std::move(callback));
142:     return id;
143: }
144: 
145: void DeviceStateMachine::RemoveStateChangeListener(int listener_id)
146: {
147:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
148:     listeners_.erase(
149:         std::remove_if(listeners_.begin(), listeners_.end(),
150:                        [listener_id](const auto &p)
151:                        { return p.first == listener_id; }),
152:         listeners_.end());
153: }
154: 
155: void DeviceStateMachine::NotifyStateChange(DeviceState old_state, DeviceState new_state)
156: {
157:     std::vector<StateCallback> callbacks_copy;
158:     {
159:         std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
160:         callbacks_copy.reserve(listeners_.size());
161:         for (const auto &[id, cb] : listeners_)
162:         {
163:             callbacks_copy.push_back(cb);
164:         }
165:     }
166: 
167:     for (const auto &cb : callbacks_copy)
168:     {
169:         cb(old_state, new_state);
170:     }
171: }
172: 
</file>

11: /**

17: class DeviceStateMachine {
18: public:
19:     DeviceStateMachine();
20:     ~DeviceStateMachine() = default;
21:

23:     DeviceStateMachine(const DeviceStateMachine&) = delete;

36:     bool TransitionTo(DeviceState new_state);

39:      * Check if transition to target state is valid from current state
40:      */
41:     bool CanTransitionTo(DeviceState target) const;
42:

44:      * State change callback type
45:      * Parameters: old_state, new_state
46:      */
47:     using StateCallback = std::function<void(DeviceState, DeviceState)>;
48: 
49:     /**
50:      * Add a state change listener (observer pattern)
51:      * Callback is invoked in the context of the caller of TransitionTo()
52:      * @return listener id for removal
53:      */
54:     int AddStateChangeListener(StateCallback callback);
55: 
56:     /**

63:      */
64:     static const char* GetStateName(DeviceState state);
65: 
66: private:
67:     std::atomic<DeviceState> current_state_{kDeviceStateUnknown};

1: #include "device_state_machine.h"
2: 
3: #include <algorithm>
4: #include <esp_log.h>
5: 
6: static const char *TAG = "StateMachine";
7: 
8: // State name strings for logging
9: static const char *const STATE_STRINGS[] = {
10:     "unknown",
11:     "starting",
12:     "wifi_configuring",
13:     "idle",
14:     "connecting",
15:     "listening",
16:     "speaking",
17:     "upgrading",
18:     "activating",
19:     "audio_testing",
20:     "fatal_error",
21:     "invalid_state"};
22: 
23: DeviceStateMachine::DeviceStateMachine()
24: {
25: }
26: 
27: const char *DeviceStateMachine::GetStateName(DeviceState state)
28: {
29:     if (state >= 0 && state <= kDeviceStateFatalError)
30:     {
31:         return STATE_STRINGS[state];
32:     }
33:     return STATE_STRINGS[kDeviceStateFatalError + 1];
34: }
35: 
36: bool DeviceStateMachine::IsValidTransition(DeviceState from, DeviceState to) const
37: {
38:     // Allow transition to the same state (no-op)
39:     if (from == to)
40:     {
41:         return true;
42:     }
43: 
44:     // Define valid state transitions based on the state diagram
45:     switch (from)
46:     {
47:     case kDeviceStateUnknown:
48:         // Can only go to starting
49:         return to == kDeviceStateStarting;
50: 
51:     case kDeviceStateStarting:
52:         // Can go to wifi configuring or activating
53:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring ||
54:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
55: 
56:     case kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring:
57:         // Can go to activating (after wifi connected) or audio testing
58:         return to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
59:                to == kDeviceStateAudioTesting;
60: 
61:     case kDeviceStateAudioTesting:
62:         // Can go back to wifi configuring
63:         return to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
64: 
65:     case kDeviceStateActivating:
66:         // Can go to upgrading, idle, or back to wifi configuring (on error)
67:         return to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
68:                to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
69:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
70: 
71:     case kDeviceStateUpgrading:
72:         // Can go to idle (upgrade failed) or activating
73:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
74:                to == kDeviceStateActivating;
75: 
76:     case kDeviceStateIdle:
77:         // Can go to connecting, listening (manual mode), speaking, activating, upgrading, or wifi configuring
78:         return to == kDeviceStateConnecting ||
79:                to == kDeviceStateListening ||
80:                to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
81:                to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
82:                to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
83:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
84: 
85:     case kDeviceStateConnecting:
86:         // Can go to idle (failed) or listening (success)
87:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
88:                to == kDeviceStateListening;
89: 
90:     case kDeviceStateListening:
91:         // Can go to speaking or idle
92:         return to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
93:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
94: 
95:     case kDeviceStateSpeaking:
96:         // Can go to listening or idle
97:         return to == kDeviceStateListening ||
98:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
99: 
100:     case kDeviceStateFatalError:
101:         // Cannot transition out of fatal error
102:         return false;
103: 
104:     default:
105:         return false;
106:     }
107: }
108: 
109: bool DeviceStateMachine::CanTransitionTo(DeviceState target) const
110: {
111:     return IsValidTransition(current_state_.load(), target);
112: }
113: 
114: bool DeviceStateMachine::TransitionTo(DeviceState new_state)
115: {
116:     DeviceState old_state = current_state_.load();
117: 
118:     // No-op if already in the target state
119:     if (old_state == new_state)
120:     {
121:         return true;
122:     }
123: 
124:     // Validate transition
125:     if (!IsValidTransition(old_state, new_state))
126:     {
127:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid state transition: %s -> %s",
128:                  GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
129:         return false;
130:     }
131: 
132:     // Perform transition
133:     current_state_.store(new_state);
134:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "State: %s -> %s",
135:              GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
136: 
137:     // Notify callback
138:     NotifyStateChange(old_state, new_state);
139:     return true;
140: }
141: 
142: int DeviceStateMachine::AddStateChangeListener(StateCallback callback)
143: {
144: }
145: 
146: void DeviceStateMachine::RemoveStateChangeListener(int listener_id)
147: {
148:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
149:     listeners_.erase(
150:         std::remove_if(listeners_.begin(), listeners_.end(),
151:                        [listener_id](const auto &p)
152:                        { return p.first == listener_id; }),
153:         listeners_.end());
154: }
155: 
156: void DeviceStateMachine::NotifyStateChange(DeviceState old_state, DeviceState new_state)
157: {
158:     std::vector<StateCallback> callbacks_copy;
159:     {
160:         std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
161:         callbacks_copy.reserve(listeners_.size());
162:         for (const auto &[id, cb] : listeners_)
163:         {
164:             callbacks_copy.push_back(cb);
165:         }
166:     }
167: 
168:     for (const auto &cb : callbacks_copy)
169:     {
170:         cb(old_state, new_state);
171:     }
172: }
173: 
</file>

77:         // Can go to connecting, listening (manual mode), speaking, activating, upgrading, or wifi configuring
78:         return to == kDeviceStateConnecting ||
79:                to == kDeviceStateListening ||
80:                to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
81:                to == kDeviceStateActivating ||
82:                to == kDeviceStateUpgrading ||
83:                to == kDeviceStateWifiConfiguring;
84: 
85:     case kDeviceStateConnecting:
86:         // Can go to idle (failed) or listening (success)
87:         return to == kDeviceStateIdle ||
88:                to == kDeviceStateListening;
89: 
90:     case kDeviceStateListening:
91:         // Can go to speaking or idle
92:         return to == kDeviceStateSpeaking ||
93:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
94: 
95:     case kDeviceStateSpeaking:
96:         // Can go to listening or idle
97:         return to == kDeviceStateListening ||
98:                to == kDeviceStateIdle;
99: 
100:     case kDeviceStateFatalError:
101:         // Cannot transition out of fatal error
102:         return false;
103: 
104:     default:
105:         return false;
106:     }
107: }
108: 
109: bool DeviceStateMachine::CanTransitionTo(DeviceState target) const
110: {
111:     return IsValidTransition(current_state_.load(), target);
112: }
113: 
114: bool DeviceStateMachine::TransitionTo(DeviceState new_state)
115: {
116:     DeviceState old_state = current_state_.load();
117: 
118:     // No-op if already in the target state
119:     if (old_state == new_state)
120:     {
121:         return true;
122:     }
123: 
124:     // Validate transition
125:     if (!IsValidTransition(old_state, new_state))
126:     {
127:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid state transition: %s -> %s",
128:                  GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
129:         return false;
130:     }
131: 
132:     // Perform transition
133:     current_state_.store(new_state);
134:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "State: %s -> %s",
135:              GetStateName(old_state), GetStateName(new_state));
136: 
137:     // Notify callback
138:     NotifyStateChange(old_state, new_state);
139:     return true;
140: }
141: 
142: int DeviceStateMachine::AddStateChangeListener(StateCallback callback)
143: {
144:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
145:     int id = next_listener_id_++;
146:     listeners_.emplace_back(id, std::move(callback));
147:     return id;
148: }
149: 
150: void DeviceStateMachine::RemoveStateChangeListener(int listener_id)
151: {
152:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
153:     listeners_.erase(
154:         std::remove_if(listeners_.begin(), listeners_.end(),
155:                        [listener_id](const auto &p)
156:                        { return p.first == listener_id; }),
157:         listeners_.end());
158: }
159: 
160: void DeviceStateMachine::NotifyStateChange(DeviceState old_state, DeviceState new_state)
161: {
162: }
163: 
</file>

However, there are differences in error handling: the ground truth uses `ESP_ERROR_CHECK` which will abort on failure, whereas the generated code logs an error and returns, potentially leading to undefined behavior depending on the system setup. Also, the ground truth assumes that `app.Run()` never returns (typical for event loops), but the generated code adds a manual `vTaskDelay`, implying a different execution model.

Structure Similarity (70): While both functions perform similar steps, their structural approaches differ significantly. In contrast, the generated code uses C-style function calls (`application_init()`, `application_run()`). Additionally, the conditional check for NVS initialization errors is more comprehensive in the ground truth, checking for `ESP_ERR_NVS_NO_FREE_PAGES` in addition to `ESP_ERR_NVS_NEW_VERSION_FOUND`.

Functional Completeness (80): Most core functionality is covered — NVS initialization with recovery from corruption, application initialization, and entering a main loop. results.description: The OTA constructor initializes the device's serial number by reading it from the ESP32's eFuse user data block. This ensures each device can be uniquely identified during over-the-air update processes.
