172: bool MqttProtocol::SendAudio(std::unique_ptr<AudioStreamPacket> packet)
173: {
174:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
175:     if (udp_ == nullptr)
176:     {
177:         return false;
178:     }
179: 
180:     std::string nonce(aes_nonce_);
181:     *(uint16_t *)&nonce[2] = htons(packet->payload.size());
182:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[8] = htonl(packet->timestamp);
183:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[12] = htonl(++local_sequence_);
184: 
185:     std::string encrypted;
186:     encrypted.resize(aes_nonce_.size() + packet->payload.size());
187:     memcpy(encrypted.data(), nonce.data(), nonce.size());
188: 
189:     size_t nc_off = 0;
190:     uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
191:     if (mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, packet->payload.size(), &nc_off, (uint8_t *)nonce.c_str(), stream_block,
192:                               (uint8_t *)packet->payload.data(), (uint8_t *)&encrypted[nonce.size()]) != 0)
193:     {
194:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to encrypt audio data");
195:         return false;
196:     }
197: 
198:     return udp_->Send(encrypted) > 0;

220: bool MqttProtocol::OpenAudioChannel()
221: {
222:     if (mqtt_ == nullptr || !mqtt_->IsConnected())
223:     {
224:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT is not connected, try to connect now");
225:         if (!StartMqttClient(true))
226:         {
227:             return false;
228:         }
229:     }
230: 
231:     error_occurred_ = false;
232:     session_id_ = "";
233:     xEventGroupClearBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
234: 
235:     auto message = GetHelloMessage();
236:     if (!SendText(message))
237:     {
238:         return false;
239:     }
240: 
241:     // 等待服务器响应
242:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
243:     if (!(bits & MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
244:     {
245:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
246:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
247:         return false;
248:     }
249: 
250:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
251:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
252:     udp_ = network->CreateUdp(2);
253:     udp_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &data)
254:                     {
255:         /*
256:          * UDP Encrypted OPUS Packet Format:
257:          * |type 1u|flags 1u|payload_len 2u|ssrc 4u|timestamp 4u|sequence 4u|
258:          * |payload payload_len|
259:          */
260:         if (data.size() < sizeof(aes_nonce_)) {
261:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet size: %u", data.size());
262:             return;
263:         }
264:         if (data[0] != 0x01) {
265:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet type: %x", data[0]);
266:             return;
267:         }
268:         uint32_t timestamp = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[8]);
269:         uint32_t sequence = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[12]);
270:         if (sequence < remote_sequence_) {
271:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with old sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_);
272:             return;
273:         }
274:         if (sequence != remote_sequence_ + 1) {
275:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with wrong sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_ + 1);
276:         }
277: 
278:         size_t decrypted_size = data.size() - aes_nonce_.size();
279:         size_t nc_off = 0;
280:         uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
281:         auto nonce = (uint8_t*)data.data();
282:         auto encrypted = (uint8_t*)data.data() + aes_nonce_.size();
283:         auto packet = std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>();
284:         packet->sample_rate = server_sample_rate_;
285:         packet->frame_duration = server_frame_duration_;
286:         packet->timestamp = timestamp;
287:         packet->payload.resize(decrypted_size);
288:         int ret = mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, decrypted_size, &nc_off, nonce, stream_block, encrypted, (uint8_t*)packet->payload.data());
289:         if (ret != 0) {
290:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to decrypt audio data, ret: %d", ret);
291:             return;
292:         }
293:         if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {
294:             on_incoming_audio_(std::move(packet));
295:         }
296:         remote_sequence_ = sequence;
297:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
298: 
299:     udp_->Connect(udp_server_, udp_port_);
300: 
301:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)
302:     {
303:         on_audio_channel_opened_();
304:     }
305:     return true;
306: }

results.description: The `SendAudio` function securely transmits an audio packet over UDP by first encrypting the payload using AES-CTR mode with a dynamically updated nonce that includes the packet size, timestamp, and sequence number. It ensures thread-safe access to the UDP channel and returns a boolean indicating whether the transmission was successful.

13: MqttProtocol::MqttProtocol()
14: {
15:     event_group_handle_ = xEventGroupCreate();

17:     // Initialize reconnect timer
18:     esp_timer_create_args_t reconnect_timer_args = {
19:         .callback = [](void *arg)
20:         {
21:             MqttProtocol *protocol = (MqttProtocol *)arg;
22:             auto &app = Application::GetInstance();
23:             if (app.GetDeviceState() == kDeviceStateIdle)
24:             {
25:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Reconnecting to MQTT server");
26:                 auto alive = protocol->alive_; // Capture alive flag
27:                 app.Schedule([protocol, alive]()
28:                              {
29:                     if (*alive) {
30:                         protocol->StartMqttClient(false);
31:                     } });
32:             }
33:         },
34:         .arg = this,
35:     };
36:     esp_timer_create(&reconnect_timer_args, &reconnect_timer_);
37: }

49:         esp_timer_delete(reconnect_timer_);

66: bool MqttProtocol::StartMqttClient(bool report_error)
67: {
68:     if (mqtt_ != nullptr)
69:     {
70:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Mqtt client already started");
71:         mqtt_.reset();
72:     }
73: 
74:     Settings settings("mqtt", false);
75:     auto endpoint = settings.GetString("endpoint");
76:     auto client_id = settings.GetString("client_id");
77:     auto username = settings.GetString("username");
78:     auto password = settings.GetString("password");
79:     int keepalive_interval = settings.GetInt("keepalive", 240);
80:     publish_topic_ = settings.GetString("publish_topic");
81: 
82:     if (endpoint.empty())
83:     {
84:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "MQTT endpoint is not specified");
85:         if (report_error)
86:         {
87:             SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_NOT_FOUND);
88:         }
89:         return false;
90:     }
91: 
92:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
93:     mqtt_ = network->CreateMqtt(0);
94:     mqtt_->SetKeepAlive(keepalive_interval);
95: 
96:     mqtt_->OnDisconnected([this]()
97:                           {
98:         if (on_disconnected_ != nullptr) {
99:             on_disconnected_();
100:         }
101:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT disconnected, schedule reconnect in %d seconds", MQTT_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS / 1000);
102:         esp_timer_start_once(reconnect_timer_, MQTT_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS * 1000); });
103: 
104:     mqtt_->OnConnected([this]()
105:                        {
106:         if (on_connected_ != nullptr) {
107:             on_connected_();
108:         }
109:         esp_timer_stop(reconnect_timer_); });
110: 
111:     mqtt_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &topic, const std::string &payload)
112:                      {
113:         cJSON* root = cJSON_Parse(payload.c_str());
114:         if (root == nullptr) {
115:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to parse json message %s", payload.c_str());
116:             return;
117:         }
118:         cJSON* type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
119:         if (!cJSON_IsString(type)) {
120:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Message type is invalid");
121:             cJSON_Delete(root);
122:             return;
123:         }
124: 
125:         if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "hello") == 0) {
126:             ParseServerHello(root);
127:         } else if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "goodbye") == 0) {
128:             auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
129:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Received goodbye message, session_id: %s", session_id ? session_id->valuestring : "null");
130:             if (session_id == nullptr || session_id_ == session_id->valuestring) {
131:                 auto alive = alive_;  // Capture alive flag
132:                 Application::GetInstance().Schedule([this, alive]() {
133:                     if (*alive) {
134:                         CloseAudioChannel();
135:                     }
136:                 });
137:             }
138:         } else if (on_incoming_json_ != nullptr) {
139:             on_incoming_json_(root);
140:         }
141:         cJSON_Delete(root);
142:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
143: 
144:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Connecting to endpoint %s", endpoint.c_str());
145:     std::string broker_address;
146:     int broker_port = 8883;
147:     size_t pos = endpoint.find(':');
148:     if (pos != std::string::npos)
149:     {
150:         broker_address = endpoint.substr(0, pos);
151:         broker_port = std::stoi(endpoint.substr(pos + 1));
152:     }
153:     else
154:     {
155:         broker_address = endpoint;
156:     }
157:     if (!mqtt_->Connect(broker_address, broker_port, client_id, username, password))
158:     {
159:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to connect to endpoint, code=%d", mqtt_->GetLastError());
160:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_NOT_CONNECTED);
161:         return false;
162:     }
163: 
164:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Connected to endpoint");
165:     return true;
166: }

175:     {

177:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_ERROR);
178:         return false;
179:     }
180:     return true;
181: }

187: void MqttProtocol::CloseAudioChannel()
188: {
189:     {
190:         std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
191:         udp_.reset();
192:     }
193: 
194:     std::string message = "{";
195:     message += "\"session_id\":\"" + session_id_ + "\",";
196:     message += "\"type\":\"goodbye\"";
197:     message += "}";
198:     SendText(message);
199: 
200:     if (on_audio_channel_closed_ != nullptr)
201:     {
202:         on_audio_channel_closed_();
203:     }
204: }

206: bool MqttProtocol::OpenAudioChannel()
207: {
208:     if (mqtt_ == nullptr || !mqtt_->IsConnected())
209:     {
210:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT is not connected, try to connect now");
211:         if (!StartMqttClient(true))
212:         {
213:             return false;
214:         }
215:     }
216: 
217:     error_occurred_ = false;
218:     session_id_ = "";
219:     xEventGroupClearBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
220: 
221:     auto message = GetHelloMessage();
222:     if (!SendText(message))
223:     {
224:         return false;
225:     }
226: 
227:     // 等待服务器响应
228:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
229:     if (!(bits & MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
230:     {
231:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
232:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
233:         return false;
234:     }
235: 
236:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
237:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
238:     udp_ = network->CreateUdp(2);
239:     udp_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &data)
240:                     {
241:         /*
242:          * UDP Encrypted OPUS Packet Format:
243:          * |type 1u|flags 1u|payload_len 2u|ssrc 4u|timestamp 4u|sequence 4u|
244:          * |payload payload_len|
245:          */
246:         if (data.size() < sizeof(aes_nonce_)) {
247:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet size: %u", data.size());
248:             return;
249:         }
250:         if (data[0] != 0x01) {
251:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet type: %x", data[0]);
252:             return;
253:         }
254:         uint32_t timestamp = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[8]);
255:         uint32_t sequence = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[12]);
256:         if (sequence < remote_sequence_) {
257:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with old sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_);
258:             return;
259:         }
260:         if (sequence != remote_sequence_ + 1) {
261:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with wrong sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_ + 1);
262:         }
263: 
264:         size_t decrypted_size = data.size() - aes_nonce_.size();
265:         size_t nc_off = 0;
266:         uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
267:         auto nonce = (uint8_t*)data.data();
268:         auto encrypted = (uint8_t*)data.data() + aes_nonce_.size();
269:         auto packet = std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>();
270:         packet->sample_rate = server_sample_rate_;
271:         packet->frame_duration = server_frame_duration_;
272:         packet->timestamp = timestamp;
273:         packet->payload.resize(decrypted_size);
274:         int ret = mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, decrypted_size, &nc_off, nonce, stream_block, encrypted, (uint8_t*)packet->payload.data());
275:         if (ret != 0) {
276:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to decrypt audio data, ret: %d", ret);
277:             return;
278:         }
279:         if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {
280:             on_incoming_audio_(std::move(packet));
281:         }
282:         remote_sequence_ = sequence;
283:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
284: 
285:     udp_->Connect(udp_server_, udp_port_);
286: 
287:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)
288:     {
289:         on_audio_channel_opened_();
290:     }
291:     return true;
292: }
293: 
294: std::string MqttProtocol::GetHelloMessage()
295: {
296:     // 发送 hello 消息申请 UDP 通道
297:     cJSON *root = cJSON_CreateObject();
298:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "type", "hello");
299:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "version", 3);
300:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "transport", "udp");
301:     cJSON *features = cJSON_CreateObject();
302: #if CONFIG_USE_SERVER_AEC
303:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "aec", true);
304: #endif
305:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "mcp", true);
306:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "features", features);
307:     cJSON *audio_params = cJSON_CreateObject();
308:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(audio_params, "format", "opus");
309:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "sample_rate", 16000);
310:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "channels", 1);
311:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "frame_duration", OPUS_FRAME_DURATION_MS);
312:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "audio_params", audio_params);
313:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
314:     std::string message(json_str);
315:     cJSON_free(json_str);
316:     cJSON_Delete(root);
317:     return message;
318: }
319: 
320: void MqttProtocol::ParseServerHello(const cJSON *root)
321: {
322:     auto transport = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "transport");
323:     if (transport == nullptr || strcmp(transport->valuestring, "udp") != 0)
324:     {
325:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Unsupported transport: %s", transport->valuestring);
326:         return;
327:     }
328: 
329:     auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
330:     if (cJSON_IsString(session_id))
331:     {
332:         session_id_ = session_id->valuestring;
333:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Session ID: %s", session_id_.c_str());
334:     }
335: 
336:     // Get sample rate from hello message
337:     auto audio_params = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "audio_params");
338:     if (cJSON_IsObject(audio_params))
339:     {
340:         auto sample_rate = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "sample_rate");
341:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(sample_rate))
342:         {
343:             server_sample_rate_ = sample_rate->valueint;
344:         }
345:         auto frame_duration = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "frame_duration");
346:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(frame_duration))
347:         {
348:             server_frame_duration_ = frame_duration->valueint;
349:         }
350:     }
351: 
352:     auto udp = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "udp");
353:     if (!cJSON_IsObject(udp))
354:     {
355:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "UDP is not specified");
356:         return;
357:     }
358:     udp_server_ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "server")->valuestring;
359:     udp_port_ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "port")->valueint;
360:     auto key = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "key")->valuestring;
361:     auto nonce = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "nonce")->valuestring;
362: 
363:     // auto encryption = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "encryption")->valuestring;
364:     // ESP_LOGI(TAG, "UDP server: %s, port: %d, encryption: %s", udp_server_.c_str(), udp_port_, encryption);
365:     aes_nonce_ = DecodeHexString(nonce);
366:     mbedtls_aes_init(&aes_ctx_);
367:     mbedtls_aes_setkey_enc(&aes_ctx_, (const unsigned char *)DecodeHexString(key).c_str(), 128);
368:     local_sequence_ = 0;
369:     remote_sequence_ = 0;
370:     xEventGroupSetBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
371: }
372: 
373: static const char hex_chars[] = "0123456789ABCDEF";
374: // 辅助函数，将单个十六进制字符转换为对应的数值
375: static inline uint8_t CharToHex(char c)
376: {
377:     if (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
378:         return c - '0';
379:     if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F')
380:         return c - 'A' + 10;
381:     if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f')
382:         return c - 'a' + 10;
383:     return 0; // 对于无效输入，返回0
384: }
385: 
386: std::string MqttProtocol::DecodeHexString(const std::string &hex_string)
387: {
388:     std::string decoded;
389:     decoded.reserve(hex_string.size() / 2);
390:     for (size_t i = 0; i < hex_string.size(); i += 2)
391:     {
392:         char byte = (CharToHex(hex_string[i]) << 4) | CharToHex(hex_string[i + 1]);
393:         decoded.push_back(byte);
394:     }
395:     return decoded;
396: }
397: 
398: bool MqttProtocol::IsAudioChannelOpened() const
399: {
400:     return udp_ != nullptr && !error_occurred_ && !IsTimeout();
401: }

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code attempts to implement encryption and UDP transmission but deviates significantly in how it structures the packet and applies encryption.
- It misunderstands the role of the nonce: the ground truth modifies specific bytes within a copy of `aes_nonce_`, while the generated version constructs a separate 16-byte array and fills it differently.
- The placement and handling of sequence numbers differ — ground truth increments before htonl, whereas generated uses post-increment without clarity on alignment.
- Encryption logic diverges: ground truth prepends unencrypted nonce to the ciphertext; generated encrypts part of its constructed packet in-place, which may corrupt header fields that should remain plaintext.

Structure Similarity:
- Function signature matches correctly.
- Mutex locking is present but located at the end rather than the beginning, changing concurrency behavior.
- Null checks for `udp_` are both present but used slightly differently (`IsConnected()` added in generated).
- Logging style and usage of ESP_LOGE match, though messages vary.
- Use of mbedtls functions exists in both, but parameter application differs substantially.

Functional Completeness:
- Generated code includes additional packet framing with explicit header fields like type, flags, SSRC, etc., suggesting more feature-complete packaging than required.
- However, critical aspects such as correct nonce formatting and selective payload encryption are flawed or incorrectly implemented.
- Extra safety checks (e.g., null packet check) add robustness beyond the minimal implementation in ground truth.
- Overall functionality aims higher coverage but fails in accurately replicating core cryptographic operations.

183: bool MqttProtocol::SendAudio(std::unique_ptr<AudioStreamPacket> packet)
184: {

186:     if (udp_ == nullptr)

192:     *(uint16_t *)&nonce[2] = htons(packet->payload.size());
193:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[8] = htonl(packet->timestamp);
194:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[12] = htonl(++local_sequence_);

196:     std::string encrypted;

201:     uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};

203:                               (uint8_t *)packet->payload.data(), (uint8_t *)&encrypted[nonce.size()]) != 0)
204:     {

206:         return false;
207:     }
208: 
209:     return udp_->Send(encrypted) > 0;

216: bool MqttProtocol::OpenAudioChannel()
217: {
218:     if (mqtt_ == nullptr || !mqtt_->IsConnected())
219:     {
220:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT is not connected, try to connect now");
221:         if (!StartMqttClient(true))
222:         {
223:             return false;
224:         }
225:     }
226: 
227:     error_occurred_ = false;
228:     session_id_ = "";
229:     xEventGroupClearBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
230: 
231:     auto message = GetHelloMessage();
232:     if (!SendText(message))
233:     {
234:         return false;
235:     }
236: 
237:     // 等待服务器响应
238:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
239:     if (!(bits & MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
240:     {
241:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
242:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
243:         return false;
244:     }
245: 
246:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
247:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
248:     udp_ = network->CreateUdp(2);
249:     udp_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &data)
250:                     {
251:         /*
252:          * UDP Encrypted OPUS Packet Format:
253:          * |type 1u|flags 1u|payload_len 2u|ssrc 4u|timestamp 4u|sequence 4u|
254:          * |payload payload_len|
255:          */
256:         if (data.size() < sizeof(aes_nonce_)) {
257:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet size: %u", data.size());
258:             return;
259:         }
260:         if (data[0] != 0x01) {
261:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet type: %x", data[0]);
262:             return;
263:         }
264:         uint32_t timestamp = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[8]);
265:         uint32_t sequence = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[12]);
266:         if (sequence < remote_sequence_) {
267:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with old sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_);
268:             return;
269:         }
270:         if (sequence != remote_sequence_ + 1) {
271:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with wrong sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_ + 1);
272:         }
273: 
274:         size_t decrypted_size = data.size() - aes_nonce_.size();
275:         size_t nc_off = 0;
276:         uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
277:         auto nonce = (uint8_t*)data.data();
278:         auto encrypted = (uint8_t*)data.data() + aes_nonce_.size();
279:         auto packet = std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>();
280:         packet->sample_rate = server_sample_rate_;
281:         packet->frame_duration = server_frame_duration_;
282:         packet->timestamp = timestamp;
283:         packet->payload.resize(decrypted_size);
284:         int ret = mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, decrypted_size, &nc_off, nonce, stream_block, encrypted, (uint8_t*)packet->payload.data());
285:         if (ret != 0) {
286:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to decrypt audio data, ret: %d", ret);
287:             return;
288:         }
289:         if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {
290:             on_incoming_audio_(std::move(packet));
291:         }
292:         remote_sequence_ = sequence;
293:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
294: 
295:     udp_->Connect(udp_server_, udp_port_);
296: 
297:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)
298:     {
299:         on_audio_channel_opened_();
300:     }
301:     return true;
302: }

304: std::string MqttProtocol::GetHelloMessage()
305: {
306:     // 发送 hello 消息申请 UDP 通道
307:     cJSON *root = cJSON_CreateObject();
308:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "type", "hello");
309:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "version", 3);
310:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "transport", "udp");
311:     cJSON *features = cJSON_CreateObject();
312: #if CONFIG_USE_SERVER_AEC
313:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "aec", true);
314: #endif
315:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "mcp", true);

317:     cJSON *audio_params = cJSON_CreateObject();
318:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(audio_params, "format", "opus");
319:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "sample_rate", 16000);
320:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "channels", 1);
321:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "frame_duration", OPUS_FRAME_DURATION_MS);
322:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "audio_params", audio_params);
323:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
324:     std::string message(json_str);
325:     cJSON_free(json_str);
326:     cJSON_Delete(root);
327:     return message;
328: }

330: void MqttProtocol::ParseServerHello(const cJSON *root)
331: {
332:     auto transport = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "transport");
333:     if (transport == nullptr || strcmp(transport->valuestring, "udp") != 0)
334:     {
335:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Unsupported transport: %s", transport->valuestring);
336:         return;
337:     }
338: 
339:     auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
340:     if (cJSON_IsString(session_id))
341:     {
342:         session_id_ = session_id->valuestring;
343:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Session ID: %s", session_id_.c_str());
344:     }
345: 
346:     // Get sample rate from hello message
347:     auto audio_params = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "audio_params");
348:     if (cJSON_IsObject(audio_params))
349:     {
350:         auto sample_rate = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "sample_rate");
351:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(sample_rate))
352:         {
353:             server_sample_rate_ = sample_rate->valueint;
354:         }
355:         auto frame_duration = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "frame_duration");
356:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(frame_duration))
357:         {
358:             server_frame_duration_ = frame_duration->valueint;
359:         }
360:     }
361: 
362:     auto udp = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "udp");
363:     if (!cJSON_IsObject(udp))
364:     {
365:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "UDP is not specified");
366:         return;
367:     }
368:     udp_server_ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "server")->valuestring;
369:     udp_port_ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "port")->valueint;
370:     auto key = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "key")->valuestring;
371:     auto nonce = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "nonce")->valuestring;
372: 
373:     // auto encryption = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "encryption")->valuestring;
374:     // ESP_LOGI(TAG, "UDP server: %s, port: %d, encryption: %s", udp_server_.c_str(), udp_port_, encryption);
375:     aes_nonce_ = DecodeHexString(nonce);
376:     mbedtls_aes_init(&aes_ctx_);
377:     mbedtls_aes_setkey_enc(&aes_ctx_, (const unsigned char *)DecodeHexString(key).c_str(), 128);
378:     local_sequence_ = 0;
379:     remote_sequence_ = 0;
380:     xEventGroupSetBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
381: }

383: static const char hex_chars[] = "0123456789ABCDEF";
384: // 辅助函数，将单个十六进制字符转换为对应的数值
385: static inline uint8_t CharToHex(char c)
386: {
387:     if (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
388:         return c - '0';
389:     if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F')
390:         return c - 'A' + 10;
391:     if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f')
392:         return c - 'a' + 10;
393:     return 0; // 对于无效输入，返回0
394: }

396: std::string MqttProtocol::DecodeHexString(const std::string &hex_string)
397: {
398:     std::string decoded;
399:     decoded.reserve(hex_string.size() / 2);
400:     for (size_t i = 0; i < hex_string.size(); i += 2)
401:     {
402:         char byte = (CharToHex(hex_string[i]) << 4) | CharToHex(hex_string[i + 1]);
403:         decoded.push_back(byte);
404:     }
405:     return decoded;
406: }

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness (85): The generated code largely maintains the same semantic meaning as the ground truth. Both functions aim to close the audio channel by resetting the UDP connection, sending a goodbye message, and triggering a callback. However, there are some notable differences: 1) The generated code adds extra checks for MQTT connection status and non-empty session ID before sending the message, which changes the conditions under which the goodbye message is sent. 2) The generated code clears the session_id_ while the ground truth does not. 3) Different JSON construction methods are used (cJSON vs string concatenation). These differences slightly alter the behavior but maintain core semantics.

Structure Similarity (70): The overall structure differs significantly. While both follow a lock-reset-send-callback pattern, the generated code has a more complex flow with additional conditional checks and JSON handling. Key structural differences include: 1) Different JSON construction approaches (manual string building vs cJSON library), 2) Additional null checks and connection state validation, 3) Extra session clearing logic, 4) Different placement and scope of mutex locking. The function signature is the same, but internal control flow diverges considerably.

Functional Completeness (90): The generated code covers all key functionalities from the ground truth and even adds some defensive programming practices. It properly handles UDP reset, sends goodbye messages, triggers callbacks, and adds session cleanup. Additional functionality includes MQTT connection validation and proper cJSON memory management. The only missing aspect is that session_id_ handling differs (cleared in generated vs preserved in ground truth), but this could be seen as an enhancement rather than incompleteness. All core responsibilities are addressed.

results.description: The `MqttProtocol::OpenAudioChannel` function establishes a secure audio communication channel by connecting to an MQTT server, sending a hello message, and waiting for a server response. Upon successful handshake, it sets up a UDP connection to receive encrypted OPUS audio packets, which are then decrypted and passed to a callback for further processing. The function ensures proper sequencing and timing of audio data while handling potential errors such as timeouts or invalid packet sequences.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code attempts to implement the core functionality of opening an audio channel via MQTT and setting up a UDP connection.
- However, there are significant semantic differences:
  * It does not check if MQTT is connected before proceeding, unlike the ground truth which reconnects if needed.
  * Lacks proper mutex locking when accessing shared resources.
  * Does not properly handle timestamps from the packet header; instead hardcodes timestamp to 0.
  * Uses `OnData` callback instead of `OnMessage`, suggesting incorrect API usage.
  * Incorrectly assumes that the sequence number is at offset 12 in the nonce, whereas in ground truth it's part of a structured header after the nonce.

Structure Similarity:
- Function signature matches but lacks some initialization steps like clearing event bits or resetting error state.
- Control flow diverges significantly in how MQTT connection status is handled.
- API calls differ in UDP creation (`CreateUdp(2)` vs `CreateUdp()`), indicating possible protocol mismatch.
- Timeout value differs (5s vs 10s).
- Callback registration uses different method names and logic flow.

Functional Completeness:
- Missing critical elements such as:
  * Reconnecting MQTT client if disconnected.
  * Proper synchronization with mutex.
  * Accurate parsing of packet headers including timestamp and sequence fields.
  * Setting up correct callbacks for incoming audio (`on_incoming_audio_` vs `on_audio_packet_`).
  * Calling `on_audio_channel_opened_` upon successful setup.
- Some basic structure for sending hello message and waiting for response exists, but lacks robustness and correctness found in the ground truth.

results.description: The `GetHelloMessage` function generates a JSON-formatted MQTT hello message to request a UDP channel for audio communication. It includes device capabilities such as AEC and MCP support, along with audio parameters like format, sample rate, and frame duration. This message is used to initiate connection and negotiate features with the server.

13: MqttProtocol::MqttProtocol()
14: {
15:     event_group_handle_ = xEventGroupCreate();
16: 
17:     // Initialize reconnect timer
18:     esp_timer_create_args_t reconnect_timer_args = {

20:         {
21:             MqttProtocol *protocol = (MqttProtocol *)arg;
22:             auto &app = Application::GetInstance();
23:             if (app.GetDeviceState() == kDeviceStateIdle)
24:             {
25:                 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Reconnecting to MQTT server");
26:                 auto alive = protocol->alive_; // Capture alive flag
27:                 app.Schedule([protocol, alive]()
28:                              {
29:                     if (*alive) {
30:                         protocol->StartMqttClient(false);
31:                     } });

43:     // Mark as dead first to prevent any pending scheduled tasks from executing
44:     *alive_ = false;
45:

47:     {
48:         esp_timer_stop(reconnect_timer_);
49:         esp_timer_delete(reconnect_timer_);
50:     }

61: bool MqttProtocol::Start()

63:     return StartMqttClient(false);
64: }

66: bool MqttProtocol::StartMqttClient(bool report_error)
67: {
68:     if (mqtt_ != nullptr)
69:     {
70:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Mqtt client already started");
71:         mqtt_.reset();
72:     }
73: 
74:     Settings settings("mqtt", false);
75:     auto endpoint = settings.GetString("endpoint");
76:     auto client_id = settings.GetString("client_id");
77:     auto username = settings.GetString("username");
78:     auto password = settings.GetString("password");
79:     int keepalive_interval = settings.GetInt("keepalive", 240);
80:     publish_topic_ = settings.GetString("publish_topic");
81: 
82:     if (endpoint.empty())
83:     {
84:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "MQTT endpoint is not specified");
85:         if (report_error)
86:         {
87:             SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_NOT_FOUND);
88:         }
89:         return false;
90:     }
91: 
92:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
93:     mqtt_ = network->CreateMqtt(0);
94:     mqtt_->SetKeepAlive(keepalive_interval);
95: 
96:     mqtt_->OnDisconnected([this]()
97:                           {
98:         if (on_disconnected_ != nullptr) {
99:             on_disconnected_();
100:         }
101:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT disconnected, schedule reconnect in %d seconds", MQTT_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS / 1000);
102:         esp_timer_start_once(reconnect_timer_, MQTT_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS * 1000); });
103: 
104:     mqtt_->OnConnected([this]()
105:                        {
106:         if (on_connected_ != nullptr) {
107:             on_connected_();
108:         }
109:         esp_timer_stop(reconnect_timer_); });
110: 
111:     mqtt_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &topic, const std::string &payload)
112:                      {
113:         cJSON* root = cJSON_Parse(payload.c_str());
114:         if (root == nullptr) {
115:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to parse json message %s", payload.c_str());
116:             return;
117:         }
118:         cJSON* type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
119:         if (!cJSON_IsString(type)) {
120:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Message type is invalid");
121:             cJSON_Delete(root);
122:             return;
123:         }
124: 
125:         if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "hello") == 0) {
126:             ParseServerHello(root);
127:         } else if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "goodbye") == 0) {
128:             auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
129:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Received goodbye message, session_id: %s", session_id ? session_id->valuestring : "null");
130:             if (session_id == nullptr || session_id_ == session_id->valuestring) {
131:                 auto alive = alive_;  // Capture alive flag
132:                 Application::GetInstance().Schedule([this, alive]() {
133:                     if (*alive) {
134:                         CloseAudioChannel();
135:                     }
136:                 });
137:             }
138:         } else if (on_incoming_json_ != nullptr) {
139:             on_incoming_json_(root);
140:         }
141:         cJSON_Delete(root);
142:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
143: 
144:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Connecting to endpoint %s", endpoint.c_str());
145:     std::string broker_address;
146:     int broker_port = 8883;
147:     size_t pos = endpoint.find(':');
148:     if (pos != std::string::npos)
149:     {
150:         broker_address = endpoint.substr(0, pos);
151:         broker_port = std::stoi(endpoint.substr(pos + 1));
152:     }
153:     else
154:     {
155:         broker_address = endpoint;
156:     }
157:     if (!mqtt_->Connect(broker_address, broker_port, client_id, username, password))
158:     {
159:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to connect to endpoint, code=%d", mqtt_->GetLastError());
160:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_NOT_CONNECTED);
161:         return false;
162:     }
163: 
164:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Connected to endpoint");
165:     return true;
166: }

168: bool MqttProtocol::SendText(const std::string &text)
169: {
170:     if (publish_topic_.empty())
171:     {
172:         return false;
173:     }
174:     if (!mqtt_->Publish(publish_topic_, text))
175:     {
176:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to publish message: %s", text.c_str());
177:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_ERROR);
178:         return false;
179:     }
180:     return true;
181: }

183: bool MqttProtocol::SendAudio(std::unique_ptr<AudioStreamPacket> packet)
184: {
185:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
186:     if (udp_ == nullptr)
187:     {
188:         return false;
189:     }
190: 
191:     std::string nonce(aes_nonce_);
192:     *(uint16_t *)&nonce[2] = htons(packet->payload.size());
193:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[8] = htonl(packet->timestamp);
194:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[12] = htonl(++local_sequence_);
195: 
196:     std::string encrypted;
197:     encrypted.resize(aes_nonce_.size() + packet->payload.size());
198:     memcpy(encrypted.data(), nonce.data(), nonce.size());
199: 
200:     size_t nc_off = 0;
201:     uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
202:     if (mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, packet->payload.size(), &nc_off, (uint8_t *)nonce.c_str(), stream_block,
203:                               (uint8_t *)packet->payload.data(), (uint8_t *)&encrypted[nonce.size()]) != 0)
204:     {
205:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to encrypt audio data");
206:         return false;
207:     }
208: 
209:     return udp_->Send(encrypted) > 0;
210: }

212: void MqttProtocol::CloseAudioChannel()
213: {
214:     {
215:         std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
216:         udp_.reset();
217:     }
218: 
219:     std::string message = "{";
220:     message += "\"session_id\":\"" + session_id_ + "\",";
221:     message += "\"type\":\"goodbye\"";
222:     message += "}";
223:     SendText(message);
224: 
225:     if (on_audio_channel_closed_ != nullptr)
226:     {
227:         on_audio_channel_closed_();
228:     }
229: }

231: bool MqttProtocol::OpenAudioChannel()
232: {
233:     if (mqtt_ == nullptr || !mqtt_->IsConnected())
234:     {
235:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT is not connected, try to connect now");
236:         if (!StartMqttClient(true))
237:         {
238:             return false;
239:         }
240:     }
241: 
242:     error_occurred_ = false;
243:     session_id_ = "";
244:     xEventGroupClearBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
245: 
246:     auto message = GetHelloMessage();
247:     if (!SendText(message))
248:     {
249:         return false;
250:     }
251: 
252:     // 等待服务器响应
253:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
254:     if (!(bits & MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
255:     {
256:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
257:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
258:         return false;
259:     }
260: 
261:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
262:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
263:     udp_ = network->CreateUdp(2);
264:     udp_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &data)
265:                     {
266:         /*
267:          * UDP Encrypted OPUS Packet Format:
268:          * |type 1u|flags 1u|payload_len 2u|ssrc 4u|timestamp 4u|sequence 4u|
269:          * |payload payload_len|
270:          */
271:         if (data.size() < sizeof(aes_nonce_)) {
272:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet size: %u", data.size());
273:             return;
274:         }
275:         if (data[0] != 0x01) {
276:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet type: %x", data[0]);
277:             return;
278:         }
279:         uint32_t timestamp = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[8]);
280:         uint32_t sequence = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[12]);
281:         if (sequence < remote_sequence_) {
282:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with old sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_);
283:             return;
284:         }
285:         if (sequence != remote_sequence_ + 1) {
286:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with wrong sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_ + 1);
287:         }
288: 
289:         size_t decrypted_size = data.size() - aes_nonce_.size();
290:         size_t nc_off = 0;
291:         uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
292:         auto nonce = (uint8_t*)data.data();
293:         auto encrypted = (uint8_t*)data.data() + aes_nonce_.size();
294:         auto packet = std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>();
295:         packet->sample_rate = server_sample_rate_;
296:         packet->frame_duration = server_frame_duration_;
297:         packet->timestamp = timestamp;
298:         packet->payload.resize(decrypted_size);
299:         int ret = mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, decrypted_size, &nc_off, nonce, stream_block, encrypted, (uint8_t*)packet->payload.data());
300:         if (ret != 0) {
301:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to decrypt audio data, ret: %d", ret);
302:             return;
303:         }
304:         if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {
305:             on_incoming_audio_(std::move(packet));
306:         }
307:         remote_sequence_ = sequence;
308:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
309: 
310:     udp_->Connect(udp_server_, udp_port_);
311: 
312:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)
313:     {
314:         on_audio_channel_opened_();
315:     }
316:     return true;
317: }

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
The generated code correctly implements the intended functionality of constructing a JSON-formatted "hello" message for an MQTT protocol. It creates the correct hierarchy of JSON objects ("type", "transport", "features", and "audio_params") with appropriate values, including conditional compilation for AEC support. The logic flows in the same order as the ground truth: creating the root object, adding fields, handling nested objects, printing to string, cleaning up memory, and returning the result. One minor difference is that the version field is omitted in the generated code, which may affect semantics depending on whether it's required by the protocol.

Structure Similarity:
The overall structure closely mirrors the ground truth. Both use the same cJSON APIs in a consistent sequence. The main differences are stylistic: the generated code uses more comments and slightly different indentation but maintains equivalent control flow. Variable naming is also very similar. However, the missing "version" field represents a structural deviation from the reference implementation.

Functional Completeness:
Most core functionalities are preserved—JSON construction, feature flag handling, audio parameter specification, and proper resource cleanup. However, the absence of the "version": 3 field is a significant omission since this might be expected by the receiving end of the protocol. Without this field, the message could be considered incomplete or incompatible with systems relying on version checking. All other aspects such as format ("opus"), sample rate (16000), channels (1), and frame duration are included properly.

results.description: The `ParseServerHello` function processes the server's hello message to extract and configure UDP transport settings, including the server address, port, encryption key, and nonce. It also retrieves audio parameters such as sample rate and frame duration, initializes AES encryption, and signals that the server hello has been successfully processed. This enables secure real-time audio communication over UDP.

192:     *(uint16_t *)&nonce[2] = htons(packet->payload.size());

194:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[12] = htonl(++local_sequence_);

335:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "channels", 1);
336:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "frame_duration", OPUS_FRAME_DURATION_MS);
337:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "audio_params", audio_params);
338:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);

350: // 辅助函数，将单个十六进制字符转换为对应的数值
351: static inline uint8_t CharToHex(char c)
352: {
353:     if (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
354:         return c - '0';
355:     if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F')
356:         return c - 'A' + 10;
357:     if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f')
358:         return c - 'a' + 10;
359:     return 0; // 对于无效输入，返回0

362: std::string MqttProtocol::DecodeHexString(const std::string &hex_string)
363: {
364:     std::string decoded;
365:     decoded.reserve(hex_string.size() / 2);
366:     for (size_t i = 0; i < hex_string.size(); i += 2)
367:     {
368:         char byte = (CharToHex(hex_string[i]) << 4) | CharToHex(hex_string[i + 1]);
369:         decoded.push_back(byte);
370:     }
371:     return decoded;
372: }

Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code attempts to parse a server hello message but interprets the JSON structure differently than the ground truth.
- It looks for "server" and "encryption" fields at the root level instead of parsing "udp" object which contains server info and encryption details in the ground truth.
- Key logic such as extracting UDP parameters from an "udp" sub-object is missing or misplaced.
- Error handling and logging differ, e.g., checking for null transport before accessing valuestring in generated vs direct access in ground truth.

Structure Similarity:
- Function signature matches.
- Both use cJSON library and follow similar variable naming patterns.
- Control flow diverges significantly due to incorrect field traversal paths.
- Use of mbedtls and event group signaling are preserved.
- Order of operations differs; for example, session ID extraction happens first in generated while transport validation occurs earlier in ground truth.

Functional Completeness:
- Misses correct parsing of nested objects like "udp" and its contents ("server", "port", "key", "nonce").
- Does not correctly initialize sequence numbers (local_sequence_, remote_sequence_) which may be important for protocol state.
- Lacks some error checks present in the original (e.g., verifying that "udp" is an object).
- Adds extra validations (like key/nonce size checks) that weren't in the original but could be seen as improvements.
- Overall coverage of features is partial – critical parts related to UDP configuration and crypto setup do not align with expected input format.

253:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
254:     if (!(bits & MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
255:     {
256:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
257:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
258:         return false;
259:     }
260: 
261:     std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(channel_mutex_);
262:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
263:     udp_ = network->CreateUdp(2);
264:     udp_->OnMessage([this](const std::string &data)
265:                     {
266:         /*
267:          * UDP Encrypted OPUS Packet Format:
268:          * |type 1u|flags 1u|payload_len 2u|ssrc 4u|timestamp 4u|sequence 4u|
269:          * |payload payload_len|
270:          */
271:         if (data.size() < sizeof(aes_nonce_)) {
272:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet size: %u", data.size());
273:             return;
274:         }
275:         if (data[0] != 0x01) {
276:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid audio packet type: %x", data[0]);
277:             return;
278:         }
279:         uint32_t timestamp = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[8]);
280:         uint32_t sequence = ntohl(*(uint32_t*)&data[12]);
281:         if (sequence < remote_sequence_) {
282:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with old sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_);
283:             return;
284:         }
285:         if (sequence != remote_sequence_ + 1) {
286:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Received audio packet with wrong sequence: %lu, expected: %lu", sequence, remote_sequence_ + 1);
287:         }
288: 
289:         size_t decrypted_size = data.size() - aes_nonce_.size();
290:         size_t nc_off = 0;
291:         uint8_t stream_block[16] = {0};
292:         auto nonce = (uint8_t*)data.data();
293:         auto encrypted = (uint8_t*)data.data() + aes_nonce_.size();
294:         auto packet = std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>();
295:         packet->sample_rate = server_sample_rate_;
296:         packet->frame_duration = server_frame_duration_;
297:         packet->timestamp = timestamp;
298:         packet->payload.resize(decrypted_size);
299:         int ret = mbedtls_aes_crypt_ctr(&aes_ctx_, decrypted_size, &nc_off, nonce, stream_block, encrypted, (uint8_t*)packet->payload.data());
300:         if (ret != 0) {
301:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to decrypt audio data, ret: %d", ret);
302:             return;
303:         }
304:         if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {

306:         }
307:         remote_sequence_ = sequence;
308:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });

312:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)

319: std::string MqttProtocol::GetHelloMessage()
320: {
321:     // 发送 hello 消息申请 UDP 通道
322:     cJSON *root = cJSON_CreateObject();
323:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "type", "hello");
324:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "version", 3);
325:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "transport", "udp");
326:     cJSON *features = cJSON_CreateObject();
327: #if CONFIG_USE_SERVER_AEC
328:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "aec", true);
329: #endif
330:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "mcp", true);
331:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "features", features);
332:     cJSON *audio_params = cJSON_CreateObject();
333:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(audio_params, "format", "opus");
334:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "sample_rate", 16000);
335:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "channels", 1);
336:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "frame_duration", OPUS_FRAME_DURATION_MS);
337:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "audio_params", audio_params);
338:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
339:     std::string message(json_str);
340:     cJSON_free(json_str);
341:     cJSON_Delete(root);

345: void MqttProtocol::ParseServerHello(const cJSON *root)
346: {
347:     auto transport = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "transport");
348:     if (transport == nullptr || strcmp(transport->valuestring, "udp") != 0)
349:     {
350:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Unsupported transport: %s", transport->valuestring);
351:         return;
352:     }
353: 
354:     auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
355:     if (cJSON_IsString(session_id))
356:     {
357:         session_id_ = session_id->valuestring;
358:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Session ID: %s", session_id_.c_str());
359:     }
360: 
361:     // Get sample rate from hello message
362:     auto audio_params = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "audio_params");
363:     if (cJSON_IsObject(audio_params))
364:     {
365:         auto sample_rate = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "sample_rate");
366:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(sample_rate))
367:         {
368:             server_sample_rate_ = sample_rate->valueint;
369:         }
370:         auto frame_duration = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "frame_duration");
371:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(frame_duration))
372:         {
373:             server_frame_duration_ = frame_duration->valueint;
374:         }
375:     }
376: 
377:     auto udp = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "udp");
378:     if (!cJSON_IsObject(udp))
379:     {
380:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "UDP is not specified");
381:         return;
382:     }
383:     udp_server_ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "server")->valuestring;
384:     udp_port_ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "port")->valueint;
385:     auto key = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "key")->valuestring;
386:     auto nonce = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "nonce")->valuestring;
387: 
388:     // auto encryption = cJSON_GetObjectItem(udp, "encryption")->valuestring;
389:     // ESP_LOGI(TAG, "UDP server: %s, port: %d, encryption: %s", udp_server_.c_str(), udp_port_, encryption);
390:     aes_nonce_ = DecodeHexString(nonce);
391:     mbedtls_aes_init(&aes_ctx_);
392:     mbedtls_aes_setkey_enc(&aes_ctx_, (const unsigned char *)DecodeHexString(key).c_str(), 128);
393:     local_sequence_ = 0;
394:     remote_sequence_ = 0;
395:     xEventGroupSetBits(event_group_handle_, MQTT_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
396: }

399: // 辅助函数，将单个十六进制字符转换为对应的数值
400: static inline uint8_t CharToHex(char c)
401: {
402: }
403: 
404: std::string MqttProtocol::DecodeHexString(const std::string &hex_string)
405: {
406:     std::string decoded;
407:     decoded.reserve(hex_string.size() / 2);
408:     for (size_t i = 0; i < hex_string.size(); i += 2)
409:     {
410:         char byte = (CharToHex(hex_string[i]) << 4) | CharToHex(hex_string[i + 1]);
411:         decoded.push_back(byte);
412:     }
413:     return decoded;
414: }
415: 
416: bool MqttProtocol::IsAudioChannelOpened() const
417: {
418:     return udp_ != nullptr && !error_occurred_ && !IsTimeout();
419: }

96:     mqtt_->OnDisconnected([this]()

98:         if (on_disconnected_ != nullptr) {
99:             on_disconnected_();
100:         }
101:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "MQTT disconnected, schedule reconnect in %d seconds", MQTT_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS / 1000);
102:         esp_timer_start_once(reconnect_timer_, MQTT_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS * 1000); });
103: 
104:     mqtt_->OnConnected([this]()

106:         if (on_connected_ != nullptr) {

108:         }

122:             return;
123:         }
124: 
125:         if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "hello") == 0) {
126:             ParseServerHello(root);

128:             auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
129:             ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Received goodbye message, session_id: %s", session_id ? session_id->valuestring : "null");
130:             if (session_id == nullptr || session_id_ == session_id->valuestring) {

138:         } else if (on_incoming_json_ != nullptr) {

186:     if (udp_ == nullptr)

192:     *(uint16_t *)&nonce[2] = htons(packet->payload.size());
193:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[8] = htonl(packet->timestamp);
194:     *(uint32_t *)&nonce[12] = htonl(++local_sequence_);

196:     std::string encrypted;

204:     {
205:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to encrypt audio data");
206:         return false;
207:     }
208: 
209:     return udp_->Send(encrypted) > 0;

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness (90): The generated code correctly implements the core logic of hex string decoding. Both versions convert pairs of hex characters to bytes using CharToHex function and bit operations. However, the generated code includes an additional bounds check that handles edge cases (odd-length strings) which the ground truth doesn't explicitly address but might be handled elsewhere or assume even-length input.

Structure Similarity (85): The overall structure is very similar - both use string reservation, loop through the input in steps of 2, perform the same bitwise operations, and build the result string. Differences include: variable naming (decoded vs result), method call (size() vs length()), explicit bounds checking in generated code, and unnecessary static_cast in generated version.

Functional Completeness (80): The generated code covers the main functionality but adds extra defensive programming (bounds checking for incomplete pairs). While this is arguably more robust, it deviates from the exact behavior implied by the ground truth. The ground truth appears to assume valid input without explicit error handling, while the generated code handles malformed input gracefully. Missing is the exact same error handling approach and implicit assumptions about input validation.

results.description: The `SendAbortSpeaking` function sends an abort message to the server when speaking needs to be interrupted, such as when a wake word is detected. It constructs a JSON-formatted message containing the session ID and the reason for aborting, then transmits it over the communication channel. This allows the system to cleanly terminate ongoing speech interactions based on specific triggers.

- The escaped quote syntax suggests potential functional issues in actual execution
- Overall covers main functionality but with significant deviations that affect correctness

results.description: The `Protocol::IsTimeout()` function checks whether the time elapsed since the last incoming message exceeds a predefined threshold of 120 seconds. If the timeout condition is met, it logs an error message indicating the channel has timed out and returns `true`; otherwise, it returns `false`. This function is used to detect and handle inactive or unresponsive communication channels.

Semantic Correctness (95): The generated code correctly implements the core timeout logic using steady_clock and duration casting. Both versions compare elapsed time against 120 seconds and return boolean results. The main semantic difference is that the generated code doesn't log the actual timeout duration value, but the core timeout detection logic is equivalent.

Structure Similarity (85): Both codes use identical function signatures and similar chrono API calls. The control flow structure is nearly identical with if-condition returning boolean values. However, the ground truth uses a named constant (kTimeoutSeconds) while the generated code uses a magic number. The variable naming differs slightly (duration vs elapsed) and the logging approach varies.

Functional Completeness (80): The generated code misses two key functional elements: 1) It doesn't define the timeout threshold as a named constant, making the code less maintainable, and 2) It doesn't log the actual timeout duration in the error message, which reduces debugging capability. All core timeout detection functionality is present, but these omissions affect completeness and code quality.

29: bool WebsocketProtocol::SendAudio(std::unique_ptr<AudioStreamPacket> packet)
30: {
31:     if (websocket_ == nullptr || !websocket_->IsConnected())
32:     {
33:         return false;
34:     }
35: 
36:     if (version_ == 2)
37:     {
38:         std::string serialized;
39:         serialized.resize(sizeof(BinaryProtocol2) + packet->payload.size());
40:         auto bp2 = (BinaryProtocol2 *)serialized.data();
41:         bp2->version = htons(version_);
42:         bp2->type = 0;
43:         bp2->reserved = 0;
44:         bp2->timestamp = htonl(packet->timestamp);
45:         bp2->payload_size = htonl(packet->payload.size());
46:         memcpy(bp2->payload, packet->payload.data(), packet->payload.size());
47: 
48:         return websocket_->Send(serialized.data(), serialized.size(), true);
49:     }
50:     else if (version_ == 3)
51:     {
52:         std::string serialized;
53:         serialized.resize(sizeof(BinaryProtocol3) + packet->payload.size());
54:         auto bp3 = (BinaryProtocol3 *)serialized.data();
55:         bp3->type = 0;
56:         bp3->reserved = 0;
57:         bp3->payload_size = htons(packet->payload.size());
58:         memcpy(bp3->payload, packet->payload.data(), packet->payload.size());
59: 
60:         return websocket_->Send(serialized.data(), serialized.size(), true);
61:     }
62:     else
63:     {
64:         return websocket_->Send(packet->payload.data(), packet->payload.size(), true);
65:     }
66: }

68: bool WebsocketProtocol::SendText(const std::string &text)
69: {
70:     if (websocket_ == nullptr || !websocket_->IsConnected())
71:     {
72:         return false;
73:     }
74: 
75:     if (!websocket_->Send(text))
76:     {
77:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to send text: %s", text.c_str());
78:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_ERROR);
79:         return false;
80:     }
81: 
82:     return true;
83: }

95: bool WebsocketProtocol::OpenAudioChannel()
96: {
97:     Settings settings("websocket", false);
98:     std::string url = settings.GetString("url");
99:     std::string token = settings.GetString("token");
100:     int version = settings.GetInt("version");
101:     if (version != 0)
102:     {
103:         version_ = version;
104:     }
105: 
106:     error_occurred_ = false;
107: 
108:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
109:     websocket_ = network->CreateWebSocket(1);
110:     if (websocket_ == nullptr)
111:     {
112:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to create websocket");
113:         return false;
114:     }
115: 
116:     if (!token.empty())
117:     {
118:         // If token not has a space, add "Bearer " prefix
119:         if (token.find(" ") == std::string::npos)
120:         {
121:             token = "Bearer " + token;
122:         }
123:         websocket_->SetHeader("Authorization", token.c_str());
124:     }
125:     websocket_->SetHeader("Protocol-Version", std::to_string(version_).c_str());
126:     websocket_->SetHeader("Device-Id", SystemInfo::GetMacAddress().c_str());
127:     websocket_->SetHeader("Client-Id", Board::GetInstance().GetUuid().c_str());
128: 
129:     websocket_->OnData([this](const char *data, size_t len, bool binary)
130:                        {
131:         if (binary) {
132:             if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {
133:                 if (version_ == 2) {
134:                     BinaryProtocol2* bp2 = (BinaryProtocol2*)data;
135:                     bp2->version = ntohs(bp2->version);
136:                     bp2->type = ntohs(bp2->type);
137:                     bp2->timestamp = ntohl(bp2->timestamp);
138:                     bp2->payload_size = ntohl(bp2->payload_size);
139:                     auto payload = (uint8_t*)bp2->payload;
140:                     on_incoming_audio_(std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>(AudioStreamPacket{
141:                         .sample_rate = server_sample_rate_,
142:                         .frame_duration = server_frame_duration_,
143:                         .timestamp = bp2->timestamp,
144:                         .payload = std::vector<uint8_t>(payload, payload + bp2->payload_size)
145:                     }));
146:                 } else if (version_ == 3) {
147:                     BinaryProtocol3* bp3 = (BinaryProtocol3*)data;
148:                     bp3->type = bp3->type;
149:                     bp3->payload_size = ntohs(bp3->payload_size);
150:                     auto payload = (uint8_t*)bp3->payload;
151:                     on_incoming_audio_(std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>(AudioStreamPacket{
152:                         .sample_rate = server_sample_rate_,
153:                         .frame_duration = server_frame_duration_,
154:                         .timestamp = 0,
155:                         .payload = std::vector<uint8_t>(payload, payload + bp3->payload_size)
156:                     }));
157:                 } else {
158:                     on_incoming_audio_(std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>(AudioStreamPacket{
159:                         .sample_rate = server_sample_rate_,
160:                         .frame_duration = server_frame_duration_,
161:                         .timestamp = 0,
162:                         .payload = std::vector<uint8_t>((uint8_t*)data, (uint8_t*)data + len)
163:                     }));
164:                 }
165:             }
166:         } else {
167:             // Parse JSON data
168:             auto root = cJSON_Parse(data);
169:             auto type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
170:             if (cJSON_IsString(type)) {
171:                 if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "hello") == 0) {
172:                     ParseServerHello(root);
173:                 } else {
174:                     if (on_incoming_json_ != nullptr) {
175:                         on_incoming_json_(root);
176:                     }
177:                 }
178:             } else {
179:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Missing message type, data: %s", data);
180:             }
181:             cJSON_Delete(root);
182:         }
183:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
184: 
185:     websocket_->OnDisconnected([this]()
186:                                {
187:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Websocket disconnected");
188:         if (on_audio_channel_closed_ != nullptr) {
189:             on_audio_channel_closed_();
190:         } });
191: 
192:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Connecting to websocket server: %s with version: %d", url.c_str(), version_);
193:     if (!websocket_->Connect(url.c_str()))
194:     {
195:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to connect to websocket server, code=%d", websocket_->GetLastError());
196:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_NOT_CONNECTED);
197:         return false;
198:     }
199: 
200:     // Send hello message to describe the client
201:     auto message = GetHelloMessage();
202:     if (!SendText(message))
203:     {
204:         return false;
205:     }
206: 
207:     // Wait for server hello
208:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, WEBSOCKET_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
209:     if (!(bits & WEBSOCKET_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
210:     {
211:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
212:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
213:         return false;
214:     }
215: 
216:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)
217:     {
218:         on_audio_channel_opened_();
219:     }
220: 
221:     return true;
222: }
223: 
224: std::string WebsocketProtocol::GetHelloMessage()
225: {
226:     // keys: message type, version, audio_params (format, sample_rate, channels)
227:     cJSON *root = cJSON_CreateObject();
228:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "type", "hello");
229:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "version", version_);
230:     cJSON *features = cJSON_CreateObject();
231: #if CONFIG_USE_SERVER_AEC
232:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "aec", true);
233: #endif
234:     cJSON_AddBoolToObject(features, "mcp", true);
235:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "features", features);
236:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "transport", "websocket");
237:     cJSON *audio_params = cJSON_CreateObject();
238:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(audio_params, "format", "opus");
239:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "sample_rate", 16000);
240:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "channels", 1);
241:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(audio_params, "frame_duration", OPUS_FRAME_DURATION_MS);
242:     cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "audio_params", audio_params);
243:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
244:     std::string message(json_str);
245:     cJSON_free(json_str);
246:     cJSON_Delete(root);
247:     return message;
248: }
249: 
250: void WebsocketProtocol::ParseServerHello(const cJSON *root)
251: {
252:     auto transport = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "transport");
253:     if (transport == nullptr || strcmp(transport->valuestring, "websocket") != 0)
254:     {
255:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Unsupported transport: %s", transport->valuestring);
256:         return;
257:     }
258: 
259:     auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
260:     if (cJSON_IsString(session_id))
261:     {
262:         session_id_ = session_id->valuestring;
263:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Session ID: %s", session_id_.c_str());
264:     }
265: 
266:     auto audio_params = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "audio_params");
267:     if (cJSON_IsObject(audio_params))
268:     {
269:         auto sample_rate = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "sample_rate");
270:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(sample_rate))
271:         {
272:             server_sample_rate_ = sample_rate->valueint;
273:         }
274:         auto frame_duration = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "frame_duration");
275:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(frame_duration))
276:         {
277:             server_frame_duration_ = frame_duration->valueint;
278:         }

results.description: The `SendAudio` function transmits audio data over a WebSocket connection using version-specific binary protocols (v2 or v3) or raw payload format based on the negotiated protocol version. The function supports real-time audio streaming with timestamping and payload size encoding depending on the protocol version.

62: bool WebsocketProtocol::OpenAudioChannel()
63: {
64:     Settings settings("websocket", false);
65:     std::string url = settings.GetString("url");
66:     std::string token = settings.GetString("token");
67:     int version = settings.GetInt("version");
68:     if (version != 0)
69:     {
70:         version_ = version;
71:     }
72: 
73:     error_occurred_ = false;
74: 
75:     auto network = Board::GetInstance().GetNetwork();
76:     websocket_ = network->CreateWebSocket(1);
77:     if (websocket_ == nullptr)
78:     {
79:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to create websocket");
80:         return false;
81:     }
82: 
83:     if (!token.empty())
84:     {
85:         // If token not has a space, add "Bearer " prefix
86:         if (token.find(" ") == std::string::npos)
87:         {
88:             token = "Bearer " + token;
89:         }
90:         websocket_->SetHeader("Authorization", token.c_str());
91:     }
92:     websocket_->SetHeader("Protocol-Version", std::to_string(version_).c_str());
93:     websocket_->SetHeader("Device-Id", SystemInfo::GetMacAddress().c_str());
94:     websocket_->SetHeader("Client-Id", Board::GetInstance().GetUuid().c_str());
95: 
96:     websocket_->OnData([this](const char *data, size_t len, bool binary)
97:                        {
98:         if (binary) {
99:             if (on_incoming_audio_ != nullptr) {
100:                 if (version_ == 2) {
101:                     BinaryProtocol2* bp2 = (BinaryProtocol2*)data;
102:                     bp2->version = ntohs(bp2->version);
103:                     bp2->type = ntohs(bp2->type);
104:                     bp2->timestamp = ntohl(bp2->timestamp);
105:                     bp2->payload_size = ntohl(bp2->payload_size);
106:                     auto payload = (uint8_t*)bp2->payload;
107:                     on_incoming_audio_(std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>(AudioStreamPacket{
108:                         .sample_rate = server_sample_rate_,
109:                         .frame_duration = server_frame_duration_,
110:                         .timestamp = bp2->timestamp,
111:                         .payload = std::vector<uint8_t>(payload, payload + bp2->payload_size)
112:                     }));
113:                 } else if (version_ == 3) {
114:                     BinaryProtocol3* bp3 = (BinaryProtocol3*)data;
115:                     bp3->type = bp3->type;
116:                     bp3->payload_size = ntohs(bp3->payload_size);
117:                     auto payload = (uint8_t*)bp3->payload;
118:                     on_incoming_audio_(std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>(AudioStreamPacket{
119:                         .sample_rate = server_sample_rate_,
120:                         .frame_duration = server_frame_duration_,
121:                         .timestamp = 0,
122:                         .payload = std::vector<uint8_t>(payload, payload + bp3->payload_size)
123:                     }));
124:                 } else {
125:                     on_incoming_audio_(std::make_unique<AudioStreamPacket>(AudioStreamPacket{
126:                         .sample_rate = server_sample_rate_,
127:                         .frame_duration = server_frame_duration_,
128:                         .timestamp = 0,
129:                         .payload = std::vector<uint8_t>((uint8_t*)data, (uint8_t*)data + len)
130:                     }));
131:                 }
132:             }
133:         } else {
134:             // Parse JSON data
135:             auto root = cJSON_Parse(data);
136:             auto type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
137:             if (cJSON_IsString(type)) {
138:                 if (strcmp(type->valuestring, "hello") == 0) {
139:                     ParseServerHello(root);
140:                 } else {
141:                     if (on_incoming_json_ != nullptr) {
142:                         on_incoming_json_(root);
143:                     }
144:                 }
145:             } else {
146:                 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Missing message type, data: %s", data);
147:             }
148:             cJSON_Delete(root);
149:         }
150:         last_incoming_time_ = std::chrono::steady_clock::now(); });
151: 
152:     websocket_->OnDisconnected([this]()
153:                                {
154:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Websocket disconnected");
155:         if (on_audio_channel_closed_ != nullptr) {
156:             on_audio_channel_closed_();
157:         } });
158: 
159:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Connecting to websocket server: %s with version: %d", url.c_str(), version_);
160:     if (!websocket_->Connect(url.c_str()))
161:     {
162:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to connect to websocket server, code=%d", websocket_->GetLastError());
163:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_NOT_CONNECTED);
164:         return false;
165:     }
166: 
167:     // Send hello message to describe the client
168:     auto message = GetHelloMessage();
169:     if (!SendText(message))
170:     {
171:         return false;
172:     }
173: 
174:     // Wait for server hello
175:     EventBits_t bits = xEventGroupWaitBits(event_group_handle_, WEBSOCKET_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT, pdTRUE, pdFALSE, pdMS_TO_TICKS(10000));
176:     if (!(bits & WEBSOCKET_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT))
177:     {
178:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to receive server hello");
179:         SetError(Lang::Strings::SERVER_TIMEOUT);
180:         return false;
181:     }
182: 
183:     if (on_audio_channel_opened_ != nullptr)
184:     {
185:         on_audio_channel_opened_();
186:     }
187: 
188:     return true;
189: }

192: {
193:     // keys: message type, version, audio_params (format, sample_rate, channels)
194:     cJSON *root = cJSON_CreateObject();
195:     cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "type", "hello");
196:     cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "version", version_);

210:     auto json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
211:     std::string message(json_str);
212:     cJSON_free(json_str);
213:     cJSON_Delete(root);
214:     return message;
215: }

217: void WebsocketProtocol::ParseServerHello(const cJSON *root)
218: {
219:     auto transport = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "transport");
220:     if (transport == nullptr || strcmp(transport->valuestring, "websocket") != 0)
221:     {
222:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Unsupported transport: %s", transport->valuestring);
223:         return;
224:     }
225: 
226:     auto session_id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "session_id");
227:     if (cJSON_IsString(session_id))
228:     {
229:         session_id_ = session_id->valuestring;
230:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Session ID: %s", session_id_.c_str());
231:     }
232: 
233:     auto audio_params = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "audio_params");
234:     if (cJSON_IsObject(audio_params))
235:     {
236:         auto sample_rate = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "sample_rate");
237:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(sample_rate))
238:         {
239:             server_sample_rate_ = sample_rate->valueint;
240:         }
241:         auto frame_duration = cJSON_GetObjectItem(audio_params, "frame_duration");
242:         if (cJSON_IsNumber(frame_duration))
243:         {
244:             server_frame_duration_ = frame_duration->valueint;
245:         }
246:     }
247: 
248:     xEventGroupSetBits(event_group_handle_, WEBSOCKET_PROTOCOL_SERVER_HELLO_EVENT);
249: }

results.description: The `WebsocketProtocol::OpenAudioChannel` function establishes a WebSocket connection for audio streaming by configuring authentication headers, protocol version, and device identifiers, then setting up a data handler to process incoming binary audio packets according to specified protocol versions. It supports different binary protocols (v2 and v3) for parsing audio stream packets with appropriate byte order conversion and payload extraction. The function returns true if the WebSocket is successfully created and configured, otherwise false.
